title: SodaPop
description: Formed by five jazz and rock instrumentalists who met through college and high school communities, SodaPop is a music project based between San Diego, CA and Cleveland, OH rooted in a deep appreciation for Japanese pop culture. The project interprets the emotional and musical depth of J-POP, anime and video games music into conversations with cohesive jazz interplay and the drive of instrumental rock. Original arrangements, reimagined classics, and spontaneous improvisation: that's when music transcends the recording and becomes a living expression of SodaPop's own.

title: Welcome Ceremony
description: The Welcome Ceremony is one of the most highly anticipated main events programming. It is where many AX attendees kick off the start of their Anime Expo journey.

title: Resistance, Resilience, Cosplay, and Beauty in Anime
description: Join scholars at the JAMS@AX Academic symposium to discuss anime imagery in protest movements, ornamentation, cosplay, and mental health!

title: Workshop: Voice Acting for Japanese Anime
description: Join us in voicing your favorite anime in Japanese! We'll learn vocal warmups and tips and tricks from professional voice actors before tackling the ultimate challenge: voicing short scenes together! Don't worry about your Japanese language learning experience or level; everyone is welcome!

title: Love And Deepspace: How well do you know the boys, MC? Fan Panel [This panel is not affiliated with INFOLD]
description: [This panel is not affiliated with INFOLD] Calling all MCs, how well do you know your bias from Love and Deepspace? Have you collected every myth? Join the cast of Love and Deepace in a battle of your game knowledge on your beloved characters!

title: Special Creator Session:Yunyun Syndrome!? Rhythm Psychosis & Drunken Goddess Reflux
description: Game creator Fuyuki Hayashi and illustrator & animator odyk join for a special panel. Featuring a live drawing demonstration, the session explores the works' core concepts, development process, and unique visual direction, alongside the creative philosophy behind their distinctive worlds.

title: Crunchyroll Presents: The Exiled Heavy Knight Knows How to Game the System Early Screening
description: On his fifteenth birthday, Elymas undergoes the Ritual of Divine Blessing but is exiled and stripped of his inheritance after receiving the "defective" Heavy Knight class, which is widely mocked for its unbalanced stats and cowardice. However, Elymas secretly recognizes this world as the exact game he played in his past life, where the despised class is actually the most formidable of them all. Armed with this exclusive knowledge, he sets out to utilize his gaming memories and conquer the entire world. Join us for an early screening of The Exiled Heavy Knight Knows How to Game the System. The Exiled Heavy Knight Knows How to Game the System - Episode 1-3

title: Four Decades Of Robotech
description: Join Harmony Gold U.S.A. as we celebrate Robotech into its fourth decade of growth. Get the latest news and updates on our new toy lines, comics, board and role playing games, and the reveal of our new video game from JOYCITY! (Yes, you read right)

title: HEY! Is That An Anime Doll?
description: An anime looking doll? Have you seen those dolls that look like anime characters around the convention? Wanna know more about them? Then come to our panel where you can see them up close and hear more about the ball-jointed doll (BJD) community. And anyone who has a doll is welcome to join us too.

title: WayForward Anime Game Developer Panel
description: Game developers WayForward return to Anime Expo to showcase their latest anime-inspired video games with new trailers, behind-the-scenes, Q&A with game directors, prizes, and exclusive reveals!

title: “Goodbye, Lara” Ep 1 Screening & Behind the Scenes Talk with Director Takushi Koide (Supported by Crunchyroll)
description: Join our screen of the premiere episode of "Goodbye, Lara"! 200 years after dissolving into bubbles over a failed true love, Mermaid Princess Lara awakens in Lake Biwa. Following the show, enjoy an exclusive behind-the-scenes talk featuring the director, Takushi Koide! (Supported by Crunchyroll)

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: Umi Kyoku
description: Umi Kyoku is a crazy whale shark VTuber, voice actor, and singer, here to help you find your peace within the current of the ocean. She's enjoyed swimming all over the world to perform at different conventions, such as DoKomi in Germany and AniManGaki in Malaysia. Despite being a virtual entertainer, that does not stop her from performing remotely across the globe to share her music and storytelling.

title: Kodansha House
description: A wildly popular immersive pop-up experience presented in partnership with Anime Expo, taking place July 2–12 in the heart of Little Tokyo. Visit us at 701 E. 3rd Street and step into a one-of-a-kind anime experience.

title: Representations of History, and History in Anime
description: Meiji to Doujinshi! Join the scholars of the JAMS@AX Academic Symposium as they discuss anti-war messaging, the history of doujinshi, Ainu narratvies, and histocial characters.

title: From Japan to the US: How Manga is Acquired and What Breaks Through
description: Join Ben Applegate (Kodansha), Hope Donovan (VIZ), Leyla Aker (Square Enix), Rebecca Taylor (Inklore), and Whitney Leopard (Ink Pop)for a behind-the-scenes look at manga acquisition. Featuring editorial perspectives, this talk explores what makes series stand out, trends, and how they break through.

title: Make a Japanese Mask with Kizuna Little Tokyo!
description: Discover the rich history and modern traditions of Japanese masks! From theater to festivals, explore how masks have been used across generations in Japan. In this family-friendly workshop with Kizuna Little Tokyo, you'll design your own paper mask while connecting with Japanese American culture and Kizuna's beloved home, Little Tokyo.

title: Getting Started With Machine Embroidery
description:
Interested in adding some machine embroidered touches to your next cosplay project but not sure where to begin? Join Dessi-Desu to learn how to get started creating machine embroidery for your own cosplay projects! Dessi-Desu will discuss topics that include how to get started with digitizing, selecting hoops and stabilizer, and the variety of approaches to machine embroidery to inspire you with your next cosplay. 
*Presented by AX26 Cosplay Senpai Dessi-Desu

title: Asian Standard Time
description: Asian Standard Time is a high-energy rock group delivering powerful J-Rock hits and anime favorites from "JoJo's Bizarre Adventure", "Fullmetal Alchemist", "Erased", "Naruto", and more! Get ready to sing along, jump in, and rock out to the sounds you love!

title: Crunchyroll Presents: Hanaori-san Still Wants to Fight in the Next Life and Skeleton Knight in Another World Season 2 Early Screenings
description: All is not what it seems! A demon king becoming friends with the very person responsible for his reincarnation?! A hero forced into disguise lest his comrades find out he's a skeleton monster?! Join us for two exciting screenings where there is more than meets the eye! Hanaori-san Still Wants to Fight in the Next Life - Episode 1 Skeleton Knight in Another World - Season 2, Episode 1

title: Anime Expo Fashion Show
description: Step into the world of cutting-edge style at Anime Expo's Fashion Show. A showcase of both legacy and up and coming Japanese Fashion brands presented by a diverse range of models. From striking silhouettes to innovative materials, each look on the runway reflects the spirit of creativity and modern expression. Don't miss this unforgettable fusion of fashion, fandom, and art in motion. ***This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Anime News Network Recommends: What You Should Be Watching
description: You can count on the Anime News Network staff to be familiar with every anime each season. Join ANN Executive Editor Lynzee Loveridge and ANN review team members to discuss the season's best anime and get personalized recommendations of what you should watch next.

title: Min-Max Mayhem: The Overpowered Olympics - Presented by J-Novel Club
description: Who's truly the strongest? Join J-Novel Club for a high-energy showdown ranking overpowered light novel & manga heroes and villains! Debate mystery matchups before the characters are revealed and vote on who wins. Bold claims, fierce arguments, and ultimate bragging rights—who reigns supreme?

title: Writing the Doki Doki Literature Club Characters
description: Doki Doki Literature Club creator Dan Salvato shares his approach to designing and writing characters in DDLC and beyond, and how real human imperfection can be applied to simple character designs in order to bring out their most lovable traits. Q&A at the end.

title: Let's Dance! ParaPara101
description: In this panel we will be exploring the history behind the Japanese line dance called ParaPara that was popularized by Gyaru girls in the 2000's as well as an interactive demonstration.

title: NRC Housewarden Meeting: A Twisted Wonderland Fan Panel
description: Calling all Housewardens! Come join us at Night Raven College for a special meeting featuring all of the school's dorm leaders! There will be a lively Q&A featuring Twisted Wonderland Cosplayers, filled with games, prizes and more! And don't worry! We will make sure a certain housewarden gets his invitation!

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: FirahFabe
description: FirahFabe is a Filipino-American VGM musician & composer. From the island of Oahu, Hawai'i now relocated to the Bay Area. As a multi-instrumentalist, he mains the Laud, a mandolin-like instrument from the Filipino Rondalla traditional ensemble family. He arranges and plays video game and anime music in a mix of acoustic traditional folk rock fusion style.

title: Drew Jackson
description: Drew Jackson, a nerdcore rap artist and content creator

title: Bandai Namco Presents: Echoes from Aincrad an Unanswered//butterfly U.S. First Look Preview
description: Risk reality and join producer Yosuke Futami, along with special guests, as he welcomes players to Echoes of Aincrad, the latest game in the Sword Art Online franchise. Attendees will receive exclusive giveaways and be among the first to see a teaser for the new anime, Unanswered//butterfly.

title: Square Enix Manga & Books Industry Panel
description: Square Enix Manga & Books, the publisher behind Daemons of the Shadow Realm, My Dress-Up Darling, & The Apothecary Diaries invites manga fans to get the exclusive on their newest publishing announcements! Join us for editorial insights, new manga & book licensing announcements, & some surprises!

title: Music of SpyXFamily
description: From Mixed Nuts to Kura Kura! Close out Day 1 of the JASM@AX Symposium with professors David F. Lopez, Elliott Jones, and John Marr, in their all new panel, as they look at this amazing, and moving music!

title: BIGWEST MACROSS Industry Panel at Anime Expo 2026
description: Join us for the BIGWEST MACROSS panel at Anime Expo 2026! Be among the first to hear the latest news, upcoming projects, and new merchandise announcements from the world of MACROSS.

title: Cosplay Senpai Roundtable
description: Come meet our 2026 Cosplay Senpai! They'll discuss everything from their favorite techniques and proudest projects to some of their greatest cosplay/conventions fails. Ask them anything as they provide advice for newbies and veterans alike.

title: Mushoku Tensei Season 3 Exclusive Premiere
description: Be among the first to experience the next chapter of Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation! Join us for an exclusive premiere screening of Season 3, as Rudeus' journey continues with new challenges, deeper bonds, and unforgettable moments. Don't miss this early look at one of the most anticipated isekai returns!

title: Chance to switch on with cosmosy
description: Join cosmosy for a fun and interactive dance workshop where members will teach choreography from their hit songs. Learn signature moves step by step, dance along with the group, and experience the energy of cosmosy up close in this special Anime Expo session.

title: GUY JEANS
description: GUY JEANS is a band bringing high-energy anime, video game, and city pop music to the stage! From nostalgic classics to modern hits, their live performance gets fans singing, dancing, and feeling the full energy of their favorite songs!

title: BLOW Brass
description: Together since 2020, BLOW Brass is an 8-piece brass band comprised of members that have recorded with Beyoncé, Karol G, John Williams, Herbie Hancock, and many others. Combining the modern with the retro and jazz with pop, BLOW transforms well-loved anime openings into something new and exciting.

title: The Tale of .hack//Z.E.R.O.: from Licensed IP to Unprecedented Self-Publishing
description: On its 30th anniversary, Japanese game developer CyberConnect2 announced .hack//Z.E.R.O., a new game in the series, which they'd gained permission from BANDAI NAMCO Entertainment to plan, develop, and publish. CC2 representatives will discuss the company's history, self-publishing, and IP projects.

title: True Digital Ownership* with BookWalker - *Terms and Conditions Apply
description: Join BookWalker's Sam Pinansky and Susan McCulloch for a (mostly) fine-print-free look at the digital manga and LN experience. Dive into how LCP tech grants cross-platform freedom and true ownership. Explore 79,000+ licensed volumes and see how BookWalker makes "digital" feel like yours to keep.

title: Inside the World of Disney+'s “Dragon Striker”
description: Enter the high-energy, high-stakes world of “Dragon Striker,” where fierce competition meets powerful magic and destiny hangs in the balance.  Go behind the scenes with the creative team as they reveal how the series fuses European fantasy and Japanese anime influences into a breathtaking original world full of rich mythology, epic music, and a deeply personal hero's journey. Audiences will be treated to exclusive insights, live artistry, and can't-miss surprises.

title: J-Pop RPD
description: Join us for a fun Random Play Dance, featuring a variety of different J-Pop songs! Ranging from Vocaloid, idols, and anisong, come join the crowd and show us your moves!

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: MAG MAG from Japan: Yuriyan Retriever (Director) in Person — Film Screening + Q&A
description: International comedian and rising filmmaker Yuriyan Retriever (Netflix Is A Joke Festival, America's Got Talent) returns to Anime Expo following her 2025 Guest of Honor appearance, now presenting MAG MAG, her live-action directorial debut from Japan. Following early buzz from international screenings, including Hollywood's Egyptian Theatre, the film marks the emergence of a distinctive new voice blending horror, humor, and personal storytelling. Join Yuriyan for a special screening followed by an in-person Q&A and live comedy segment, where she will discuss the film, her creative approach, and her journey from Japan to Los Angeles as she expands her work globally. A rare opportunity to experience a filmmaker on the rise—and a story that crosses borders in unexpected ways.

title: Crunchyroll Presents: Victoria of Many Faces and Sasaki and Peeps Season 2 Early Screenings
description: Everyone loves a good adoption story right? Victoria's a former spy just trying to redo her life and Sasaki just adopted a... Magical bird? I'm sure this will all go smoothly... Right? Join us for two early screenings that put a surprising spin on parenthood: Victoria of Many Faces and Sasaki and Peeps Season 2. Join us for two early screenings where being a parent becomes a bit too interesting! Join us for early screenings of Victoria of Many Faces and Sasaki and Peeps. Victoria of Many Faces - Episode 1. Sasaki and Peeps Season 2 - Season 2, Episode 1

title: Aniplex of America Industry Panel
description: Join Aniplex of America as we celebrate our past, present and future of anime and games with our brand new Industry Panel! Come experience the excitement, community, and nostalgia with us on a grander stage! ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: Dancing All Night: A Guide to J-Pop In The 80s
description: Join A-to-J Connections as we examine the various bands, genres, and songs that helped define one of the most memorable decades in music. Chart toppers like THE CHECKERS, Hikaru GENJI, and Anzen Chitai cross paths with City Pop artists like ANRI, Akira Terao, Mariya Takeuchi, and MANY others!

title: Anime IQ LIVE: Think You're an Anime Expert? Prove It!
description: Think you know anime better than everyone else? Step into Anime IQ LIVE, an interactive anime game show where fans compete in trivia, rapid-fire challenges, and the viral "Guess the Anime in 3 Seconds" round. Volunteer to play or test your knowledge from the crowd!

title: Katie Shesko
description: Katie Shesko is a video game and anime cosplaying flute player who plays games fast. She is known for merging her love of flute with nerdy music, so join her as she performs tunes from your favorite animes and video games with a rock flute twist!

title: Sekai Project Industry Panel
description: We are one of the leading publishers of visual novels in the West. Come join us for a discussion on the current state of our part of the gaming industry as well as learn about current and upcoming projects.

title: Nyalra: Creator of NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE
description: Step into the chaotic world of internet fame with a dive into Nyalra's cult indie hit NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE. This panel explores and social media simulation and psychological themes examining online identity parasocial relationships and the pressures of stardom, plus a look at their upcoming game.

title: Collaborating with Indie Manga Creators: Inside Manga Mavericks Books!
description: Join the Manga Mavericks Books team (store.mangamavericks.com) for an inside look into the rising indie manga publisher! Learn more about how we work directly with manga creators and be the first to hear our newest manga license announcements! We'll have prizes, surprises, special guests, and more!

title: Bluemoon Sanitizer
description: Bluemoon Sanitizer is a San Diego anime & game music cover band known for energetic live performances of anime openings, game soundtracks, and J-pop hits, performed with vibrant instrumentation and a passion for the anime community!

title: Anime Expo Plushie Making Workshop Hosted by The Plushie Workshop
description: Create your very own Plushumi The Plushie Workshop plushie at Anime Expo 2026! Choose between our adorable White Bear or Beige Bunny and bring your plushie to life through stuffing, assembly, and customization. You'll even get to see our signature knitting devices in action and try them yourself! ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: Introduction to Wotagei 101
description: Have you seen people going crazy with their lightsticks at your oshi's concert and thought, “That's so cool!”? Have you heard about wotagei from Oshi no Ko but never knew where to start? Join this panel and start your wotagei journey!

title: Bushiroad Panel at Anime Expo 2026
description: Join us as we go over upcoming product releases and new information for Bushiroad in 2026! Featuring "Palworld OFFICIAL CARD GAME", "Cardfight!! Vanguard", "Weiß Schwarz" and more! Let's Bushiroad!

title: Stories Made to Last: Infinite Presents Their Next Big Titles
description: Some stories don't just end — they stay. Infinite pours passion and emotion into crafting anime made to be loved for ten years and beyond. Come meet the Producer behind ”This Monster Wants to Eat Me" and discover their next unforgettable story: "I Want to Love You Till Your Dying Day" — and more.

title: HIDIVE Presents "Hell Mode" 2nd Season North American Premiere
description: Level grind with us for the North American premiere of the HELL MODE: The Hardcore Gamer Dominates in Another World with Garbage Balancing! 2nd Season.

title: Crunchyroll Presents: Overgeared and Saga of Tanya the Evil Season 2 Early Screenings
description: Youngwoo's a deadbeat gamer who is about to exchange all his levels for the experience of a lifetime, while Tanya has to find (or fight) faith before she's dragged back to hell. It's the job of a lifetime for these two! Join us for early screenings of Overgeared and Saga of Tanya the Evil Season 2! Overgeared - Episode 1. Saga of Tanya the Evil - Season 2, Episode 1

title: Animate Presents: ALIEN STAGE - Live Talk & Special Announcement!
description: Welcome to the survival audition program, ALIEN STAGE! This is your chance to hear exclusive insights about ALIEN STAGE from Chief Director VIVINOS and KANG PD. Plus, we've got a special announcement, so make sure to stay until the end! Guests: VIVINOS, KANG PD.

title: “CHAINSAW MAN”THE STAGE Screening by Nelke Planning
description:
“CHAINSAW MAN”, a wildly popular dark hero action manga by Tatsuki Fujimoto, has been adapted into a stage play!
The premiere production is now streaming on Crunchyroll. Come watch a special event hosted by Nelke Planning featuring a screening of the stage highlights video and comments video from the original cast and creative staff.

title: None Like Joshua
description: Imagine your favorite anime theme songs remixed into the hottest EDM beats with a high-energy, captivating rap about that anime for one incredible, interactive concert experience!

title: TOKYOPOP Presents: Love is LOVELOVE!
description: Join us for an hour-long conversation all about LOVE as TOKYOPOP staff discuss the latest upcoming titles from our LoveLove brand, what LoveLove is all about, and more!

title: Square Enix Manga Presents: The (Psychic) Power of BL with Cherry Magic! Creator Yuu Toyota
description: Calling all Fujoshi, Fudanshi, & Romance Lovers! Square Enix Manga & Books presents a special panel with the beloved creator of the BL smash hit, Cherry Magic! Thirty Years of Virginity Can Make You a Wizard?! Join Yuu Toyota for a live drawing panel, career retrospective, moderated Q&A, & more!

title: Capturing Cosplay Magic
description: This panel explores the craft of cosplay photography, drawing on five years of experience. I'll share practical strategies for collaborating with passionate, hands-on clients, communicating effectively, and elevating both creative process and final images. Attendees will learn trends, best practices, and common pitfalls in cosplay shoots.

title: InuYasha Hedbanz
description: Journey with us to the feudal era for a game of Inuyasha Hedbanz! Win prizes by working together with your team to guess a random person/place/or thing from within the InuYasha universe using only yes or no questions. Difficulty ranges from easy to hard so all fans are welcome!

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: BluPetal Industry Panel
description: Come hang out with BluPetal! We're revealing our latest titles and sharing our love for the BL, GL, Shoujo, and Josei fandoms. Join the conversation and snag an exclusive BluPetal gift while you're there!

title: Unveiling Kodansha's Latest Manga
description: Kodansha—purveyors of exciting manga like Blue Lock, Gachiakuta, Witch Hat Atelier & more—invites fans for a first look at Kodansha's latest slate of print manga licenses coming to a bookshelf near you! Join Kodansha to get this sneak peek, stay for the Q&A, & even come away with surprise giveaways!

title: Cosmic Horror: Games, Anime, and Manga at the Edge of Reality
description: The term "cosmic horror" has taken the horror world by storm in recent years, but where did it come from? What does it truly mean? Join Angel Rose as she discusses the style, its origins, its effectiveness, and its prevalence in Japanese and inspired media. Bring your favorite examples!

title: Dolly Ave
description: Dolly Ave earned airplay on major stations like 103.5 KISS FM in Chicago, the tastemaking KEXP, and Los Angeles' ALT 98.7. Dolly has graced stages at major music festivals and received coverage from Rolling Stone, Billboard, and Harper's Bazaar. In 2024, she was named to the Recording Academy's prestigious NEXT Class. She is currently apart of the Converse All Star Class of 2025. Her music has been featured across editorial playlists on Spotify, YouTube, Vevo, and Amazon Music, and her most recent independently produced showcase earned support from both Coca-Cola and Live Nation.

title: Crunchyroll Presents: The World's Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in Another World as an Aristocrat Season 2 Early Screening and Smoking Behind the Super Market With You Screening
description: A smoking gun and smoking behind the market. Not a bad combo with these two characters. Join us for an early screening of The World's Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in Another World as an Aristocrat, plus a screening of Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You! The World's Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in Another World as an Aristocrat - Season 2, Episode 1. Smoking Behind the Super Market With You - Episode 1

title: BILIBILI Live 2026: First Looks, Exciting Reveals, and Future Suprises of MADEBYBILIBILI
description: The annual MADEBYBILIBILI Party Returns! Join us exclusive cuts and announcements from your favorite MADEBYBILIBILI titles—Link Click, Heaven Official's Blessing, A Mortal's Journey, as well as brand-new releases: Tomb Raider King, Eleceed, and many more! Expect quizzes, giveaways, mystery guests, and surprises to be revealed on X @madeby_bilibili.

title: First Look | Star Wars: Visions Presents - The Ninth Jedi
description: Join Production I.G and Lucasfilm for a screening of the first episode of Star Wars: Visions Presents - The Ninth Jedi, a new, animated limited series coming this summer to Disney+, and hear about the creative process from Supervising Director Kenji Kamiyama, Director Shunsuke Tada, Producer Hitoshi Ito, and Lucasfilm Executive Producers Jacqui Lopez and Josh Rimes. The episode will be screened in Japanese, with English subtitles. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Why Japanese Content, Why Now? — Academic Symposium Presented by PopPowerProject
description: Why is Japanese content gaining momentum now? With presentations from SEGA CORPORATION on globally beloved content and IP, TV Asahi Corporation on Akane-banashi, and Dentsu Group on Gachiakuta, this symposium explores what is driving this moment and sustaining future growth. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Ink Pop: Manga for the Family
description: Discover the world of Ink Pop: your go-to for manga, manhwa, and webcomics for kids and teens! Join us for new title announcements, first looks, all-ages recommendations, and behind-the-scenes insights from our editors. Celebrate great stories, big adventures, and don't miss fun giveaways! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Gundam Cosplay 101
description: A relaxed, beginner-friendly panel that introduces the tools, techniques, and ideas needed to build -and wear!- Gundam and mecha cosplay, hosted by a cosplay veteran with over a decade of experience bringing Gundam Cosplay to Anime Expo. Hang out, ask questions, and connect with other Gundam fans. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: X-men Versus My Hero Academia
description: Welcome to the ultimate debate battle between two amazing shows! This will be an audience participation event where two teams will be formed to see who is superior! Quirks Versus the X-gene! Come check out which team will come on top as they are asked various questions in an attempt to win over the crowd! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: NecroBarkley
description: NecroBarkley is a DJ/VJ from California that's bringing the underground anime EDM scene to the dance floor. Having performed around the world in places like Tokyo, San Francisco, and New York City, his new mashups and creative visuals are always ready to get the audience partying the night away.

title: AMV Finals
description: Experience a showcase of fan-created music videos that blend anime with carefully selected music to create unique and compelling visual stories. Celebrate the creativity of the anime community as finalists compete for top honors in a variety of AMV categories.

title: HIDIVE Presents The World Is Dancing Episode 1 Encore and Episode 2 North American Premiere
description: Why do people dance? Join us for this exclusive Director's Cut of Episodes 1 & 2 of this sweeping historical drama that will make you laugh, cry and maybe even dance. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: TBS Anime Special Panel: Takopi's Original Sin Producer Talk & Upcoming Anime Showcase
description: Since its release, Takopi's Original Sin has deeply moved fans and become a major sensation. In this special panel, producers reveal behind-the-scenes stories, creative insights, and the passion that brought the series to life, followed by an exclusive presentation of TBS's upcoming anime lineup. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: The Game Design of Kingdom Hearts
description: Ever hear of a game series called Kingdom Hearts? Have you played all of the games, or skimmed some lore videos (or AX panels ;) )? If there's one or two games you may have passed on, come take a look with us as we take a little dive into the design of Kingdom Hearts across the series! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: DJ KZA
description: KZA is a Bass House and Trap Artist with an background of being an open format dj and artistic influences from Animemo/ shibuya punk aka Grind fiction which consist of titles/genres such as, jet set radio, the world ends with you, persona, gachiakuta, and more,

title: Echoheart
description: Echoheart is a Los Angeles-based anisong and J-pop cover band dedicated to bringing the world of anime music to life. Inspired by iconic anime bands and soundtracks, the group combines live musicianship with cosplay and performance to recreate the excitement of seeing your favorite 2D bands on stage. From high-energy rock anthems to emotional ballads, Echoheart celebrates the music that connects anime fans around the world.

title: WLL
description: WLL is a DJ and producer blending House, UK Garage, and electronic music with the energy of anime culture. Known for high-energy sets packed with anime edits, J-pop remixes, and euphoric club grooves, WLL transforms iconic fandom moments into dancefloor experiences. From Anime Expo to anime afterparties across the U.S., WLL brings together rave culture and anime fandom into one unforgettable vibe.

title: Welksie
description: Welksie is an LA-based producer/DJ passionate about musical storytelling, emotional journeys, and challenging expectations. Weaving EDM/Bass/J-Pop in concert with hand-synced anime visuals, Welksie's unique sound and “live-AMV” aesthetic aim to break down barriers between music and cultures alike.

title: J-POP SOUND CAPSULE
description: Turning the volume all the way up, Anime Expo brings you a must-see night where J-POP and anime music take over the stage. From powerful anime theme songs that hit the moment the first note drops, to high-energy rock sets that will have the whole crowd moving, to genre-blending sounds that bring something completely unexpected - this is a concert built to be felt live. Featuring ALI, Roselia, SPYAIR, Yoko Kanno, and Yoko Takahashi.

title: Monster Girls Rise with J18 Publishing and Kemonono★ (18+)
description: Animal girls, monster girls, demihumans: no matter what you call them, they've never been more popular! Join the staff of J18 Publishing and Kemonono★ as they explore one of the biggest genres in modern hentai manga! (Kemonono★ will be live drawing during the panel, creating a brand-new original shikishi to give away—stick around for the Q&A!) ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: Guilty or Not Guilty (18+)
description: Back for a 5th year in a row! Is your favorite character a bit… problematic, evil, or morally gray? Step into this court-style panel to defend or prosecute their actions, and make your case! In the end, you, the audience will decide: guilty or not guilty! ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: Can We Fix Them, or Do We Make Them Worse? Red & Green Flags in Anime Characters
description: Come join us as we categorize anime characters into red and green flag categories based on some of their most prominent personality traits! Can we fix your fave or do they deserve to be made worse? ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: Con Crush: I Was Transported to AX26 and Now I Must Find My Soulmate (or Friend) in Three Minutes or Less (18+)
description: Think you can find your soulmate - or at least your new favorite con buddy - in 3 minutes? Come test your fate at our speed dating and friending event! Romance, friendship, and chaotic good energy all welcome. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: PokéSketch Showdown
description: For fans of Pokémon and drawing, challenge yourself by sketching various new Pokémon under multiple categories within the time limit. No two (2) challenges are the same, and the audience will decide who made the best original drawing and receive fun prizes. Use your imagination to draw them all! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Yaoi Jeopardy! (18+)
description: Have you ever wanted to play Jeopardy but you have no idea what any of the answers are cause same??? Thats why we are hosting Yaoi Jeopardy! Where all the Fujin can play, foolish things are sure to ensue. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: Could you really survive dating your ultimate anime crush? (18+)
description: Fandom is no stranger to falling in love with a character, but if we really had a chance with them, COULD we actually survive even one date? Let alone be their partner? Anime experts and comedians break down their wildest fantasies and whether they would even be a relationship that could last. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: StarCrusaders
description: StarCrusaders is a high-energy tribute band celebrating BEAT CRUSADERS and the broader Japanese rock/anime-rock vibe. We bring the singalong hooks, crunchy guitars, and dancey punk energy to the stage—mixing faithful renditions with a live-show punch that feels like a festival set.

title: ZOA
description: ZOA is a Metalcore and bass music project from Denver Colorado.

title: Anime Trivia Night Broadcast (18+)
description: Get ready for the most outrageous trivia show for the truly cultured anime fans. Watch and play along with 3 teams competing for points, knowledge and glory! Who will win and be crowned our "2026 Cultured Anime Fan" and who will be revealed as cringe? ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Mariachi Eclipse
description: Mariachi Eclipse is a mariachi ensemble that brings anime and video game music into a live performance setting. Rooted in traditional mariachi instrumentation, the group explores well-known Japanese soundtracks through a different musical lens while maintaining the character of both styles. Their performances focus on ensemble balance, musical detail, and a strong connection with the audience, creating a sound that feels both grounded and distinctive across cultural spaces.

title: KEN HARADA
description: Ken Harada is a distinguished music producer and DJ from Tokyo, Japan, who rose to prominence in the music industry with his production of Ayumi Hamasaki's iconic hit, Duty, which sold over 3 million copies and won a Japan Record Award for Best Album. Known for his collaborations with major Japanese artists like EXILE, BoA, Kumi Koda, Ami Suzuki, SKE48, TM Revolution and many more.

title: Uncle Yuhki's Silent Library (18+)
description: Come on in! Pick a card! Careful though! Only the strong AND silent survive- and then get prizes! (ooh~) Team up and work together to complete these ANYTHING goes type tasks- BUT without creating a single sound. If you do, you shall be rewarded. Break the silence- and more punishment shall be had. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Late Comedy Showdown Preliminary Round (18+)
description: Audition to for a chance to compete in the LCS Finals! Contestants will perform a 2-minute set comedy set in front of a live panel of judges. All sets must adhere to AX guidelines.***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Texas Waifu Wars 3: 5th Anniversary Celebration (18+)
description: Since 2021 Waifu Wars has brought people all over the anime community from Fujoshis to Power-scalers all under one roof. We have returned to Anime Expo to answer one question on everyone's mind... Who is THE best waifu? Come celebrate the 5th anniversary by defending your one true love!  ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Love and Deepspace: After Dark (An Unofficial Panel) (18+)
description: (*Note: We are NOT affiliated with Infold or Papergames. This is an unofficial panel with unofficial cosplayers). The cast of Love and Deepspace are back for another fun night at Anime Expo! Come and help decide how their night shall go by playing games, asking questions, and much more! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Yaoi & Bara Tropes & Trends 2.0 (18+)
description: A panel that will go over even more tropes and trends that occur in many yaoi & bara manga, anime, & date sims. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Kinky Side to Anime (18+)
description: Seen some kinky stuff in anime? Wanna talk about and learn about it in a fun way? Welcome to the "Kinky side Anime ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Heaven or Hell (18+)
description: From the creators of Guilty or Not Guilty comes Heaven or Hell! An argumentative court-styled panel where you, the people, will play God and decide if a deceased character will go to heaven or hell based on their past actions. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Visual Novels: Interactive Literature from Japan! (18+)
description: Join Angel Rose for an exploration the visual novel game style! We'll discuss what factors make up a visual novel, genres within the medium, localization, the role of eroge, Western creations, and which underground stories went on to become your favorite anime. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Candy Bomber
description: Southern California based Anisong and J-Rock cover band Candy Bomber will rock your socks (and cosplay wigs) off with their eccentric humor and high energy performance! From nostalgic classics to current popular Anisongs, the audience will be sure to enjoy and sing along to their favorite tunes. Get your Wota-gei moves ready and show us your final form!

title: MEIRLIN
description:
Tokyo-born and LA-based, MEIRLIN is an international DJ and producer known for her high-energy main-stage house and techno sound.

She has released charting tracks on leading labels including Revealed, Smash The House, and Protocol, earning support from Hardwell, Dimitri Vegas & Like Mike, Nicky Romero, and more. Her 2024 single “Spaceflight 2099” premiered by Hardwell at Ultra Miami and surpassed 500,000 streams. A former resident at Zouk Las Vegas and part of Insomniac's artist since 2019, MEIRLIN has performed at top venues worldwide and continues to build global momentum across the U.S., Asia, and Europe.

title: Neo Sanctum
description: We are Neo Sanctum and we are a Touhou doujin music circle based in Toronto, producing both Touhou and Anime EDM, with a focus on drum & bass! We love both organize and play events in Toronto and we will be bringing our sound live as DJs at AX for the first time!

title: Khaimera
description: Khaimera is an LA-Based DJ/Producer blending EDM, Anime, and Video Game sounds into high energy sets. Known for EDM and Anime remixes and rave edits, he delivers nostalgic, and high energy performances where gaming and rave culture collide.

title: Mikan Project
description:
Mikan Project is an online collective of musicians delivering a zesty sound to the Western J-Music scene. They have performed at major industry events, notable ones being Anime Expo and Anime Boston. Online, their tight horn section is a go-to for Vocaloid producers, cover artists, as well as both indie and corporate VTubers; contributing to a wide range of projects spanning original compositions, anime, and video game music.

Whether they're in the studio, supporting the show, or taking center stage, Mikan Project brings a citrus fresh energy that leaves a lasting impression.

title: "AOASHI" — Changing the Game of Sports Anime
description: Step onto the field with "AOASHI"! Join our special MC and guests for exclusive sneak peeks of Season 2 (currently in production), behind-the-scenes talks, interactive fan challenges, and giveaways. Don't miss this special session that explores what sets "AOASHI" apart in the world of sports anime.

title: Shoemaking For Cosplay
description: Learn about the process of shoemaking from start to finish,including tools, materials, techniques, and other tips to help you get started.

title: Wig Styling- From getting started to advanced techniques
description:
Styling wigs can be hard! This panel, open to wig beginners and veterans alike, walks through basic styling techniques, advanced styling techniques, wig care and ways to troubleshoot difficult wigs. 
*Presented by AX26 Cosplay Senpai Twinfools

title: Black Fandom and Anime: How We “Adopt” Our Characters
description: Join scholars at the JAMS@AX Academic Symposium as they discuss black anime fandom and character identity!

title: Gachiakuta - Return to the Pit! Exclusive First Look at Season 2 featuring Cast and Staff
description: This garbage is getting serious! Come celebrate the thrilling, trash-filled first season of Gachiakuta with very special guests Aoi Ichikawa (voice of Rudo), Fumihiko Suganuma (director), and Naoki Amano (producer). Then, be among the very first to see what's in store for Season 2, including an early sneak peek at brand new footage!

title: Kyoto Animation's New Frontier: Sparks of Tomorrow U.S. Premiere & Director Minoru Ota Q&A
description: This panel includes the U.S. Premiere of episode 1 and episode 2 before Netflix streaming, and the panel discussion of Director Minoru Ota and Producer Satori Senami.

title: Warframe: Voices of the Void
description: Explore anime's influence on the sci-fi epic: Warframe! Join Digital Extremes' Rebecca Ford & Megan Everett, along with friends of Warframe for a look at the past, present and future! Attendees will receive codes for a Garuda & Ash Protoframe Glyph.

title: AnimEigo Industry Panel
description: New release news and announcements from AnimEigo, the oldest anime label in North America, and parent company MediaOCD.

title: JET Program 101
description: Would you like to work and live in Japan while teaching your language and culture to the Japanese people? Our panel of former participants will discuss how the program works and how you can apply. We will share our experiences and take questions. If you like to learn more, please stop by.

title: Aksys Games Panel
description: Aksys Games is back with a panel at Anime Expo delving into our upcoming releases and possibly a few surprises. Come and see what we have in store!

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: New Game+: An Anime Music Gameshow
description: Congratulations, you've mastered anime OPs and EDs. You have unlocked New Game+. Questions you face will be more difficult, with extra modifiers like OSTs and mismatched anime openings. Come face the next challenge in anime music trivia.

title: Spike Chunsoft, Inc. Official Panel 2026
description: Come celebrate Danganronpa's 15th anniversary & pre-launch of STEINS;GATE RE:BOOT! Danganronpa Producer Shohei Sakakibara, Kazutaka Kodaka and English VAs join us as guests. There will be STEINS;GATE quiz, live VA performance, giveaways and more! There might be a sneak peek of Danganronpa 2x2...!?

title: Kodansha House
description: A wildly popular immersive pop-up experience presented in partnership with Anime Expo, taking place July 2–12 in the heart of Little Tokyo. Visit us at 701 E. 3rd Street and step into a one-of-a-kind anime experience.

title: Hamu Cotton
description: Hamu Cotton is a Japanese cosplay performer and YouTuber based in California. She combines her favorite hobbies and passions - dancing, singing, acting, film, and event coordinating - to bring her favorite anime characters to life. Along with her performance activities, she hosts her own specialized event called "HamuFest" in both America and Japan. Follow her social media @hamu_cotton to keep updated on her next activities and projects!

title: Yen Press Industry Panel
description: For over a decade, Yen Press has been one of the biggest publishers of manga, releasing the likes of Black Butler, Fruits Basket and Toilet-bound Hanako-kun. Yen Press has also given a home to fan favorite categories such as light novels, audiobooks and manhwa. Join us for new announcements and Q&A!

title: SHODO "The Way of Writing"
description: Learn about Japan's traditional cultural art Shodo Calligraphy - A Hands-On experience

title: Games, Sports, and Gender in Anime
description: Join scholars at the JAMS@AX Academic symposium to discuss horsegirls, dungeons and dragons, and women in sports anime!

title: Sports Anime Festival!!!
description: Are you a fan of Haikyuu!!, Kuroko no Basket, BLUE LOCK, Yuri on Ice, SK8, or just sports anime in general? If so, this is the panel you've been waiting for! Join a talented cast of English voice actors from your favorite sports anime. Participate in exciting games like Jeopardy and more, all centered around the world of sports anime!!!

title: Asian Standard Time
description: Asian Standard Time is a high-energy rock group delivering powerful J-Rock hits and anime favorites from "JoJo's Bizarre Adventure", "Fullmetal Alchemist", "Erased", "Naruto", and more! Get ready to sing along, jump in, and rock out to the sounds you love!

title: After Class Hijinks with Suzuki and Tani of You and I Are Polar Opposites
description: Suzuki and Tani are calling, are you ready to go? Join Sayumi Suzushiro and Shogo Sakata for one final hangout before class is back in session as they treat us to the first episode premiere of Season 2, live dub some of your favorite scenes, reminisce about their favorite memories from the series and share some behind-the-scenes stories.

title: Explore Your Passions: BL/GL/Romance with MangaPlaza
description: Join MangaPlaza and our special MC & influencer guests for the ultimate BL/GL/Romance celebration! Build trope tier lists, test your manga knowledge, and connect with fans who share your passion. Discover original titles, win exclusive giveaways, and fuel your love for the genres you live for!

title: Shonen Jump Anime "KILL BLUE" -Special Homeroom-
description: Class is in session! As Shonen Jump's breakout hit "KILL BLUE" reaches its Season 1 finale, join creator Tadatoshi Fujimaki (Kuroko's Basketball) and the production team for a special homeroom featuring behind-the-scenes insights, live drawing, a "KILL BLUE" pop quiz, and exclusive giveaways.

title: I Like the Villain: Hear Me Out
description: Are villains truly evil or just misunderstood? From tragic backstories to questionable life choices, we'll explore what redeeming qualities they might have. Bring your hottest takes, your moral gray flags, and your sense of humor; things are about to get chaotic.

title: Yoshitaka Amano: Art & Entertainment — A New Creative Challenge
description: Experience the latest updates on Yoshitaka Amano's new anime project, ZAN, including an exclusive trailer screening, introductions to the legendary creative team, and previews of upcoming projects from Yoshitaka Amano's newly launched company.

title: Longsword Basics - A Workshop by SoCal Swords
description: Join founder RJ McKeehan for a beginner-friendly longsword workshop based on medieval combat manuals. Learn stances, footwork, and cutting techniques in a safe, engaging environment

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: Katie Shesko
description: Katie Shesko is a video game and anime cosplaying flute player who plays games fast. She is known for merging her love of flute with nerdy music, so join her as she performs tunes from your favorite animes and video games with a rock flute twist!

title: Behind the Scenes of the Fate/strange Fake English Dub
description: Join the English dub cast and staff for a delightful peek into the dub production of this winter's new anime hit, Fate/strange Fake!

title: Sound! Euphonium The Final Movie Part 1 & Part 2 – Kyoto Animation Chief Director Tatsuya Ishihara Special Panel & Exclusive Premiere Footage
description: Join Kyoto Animation Chief Director Tatsuya Ishihara and Producer Satori Senami for a special “Sound! Euphonium” panel. Be the first in the world to see newly revealed footage and hear directly from the creators behind Kumiko's final chapter.

title: Stay on Top of the Latest Anime News with Anime News Network
description: With over 25 years of experience, Anime News Network is the leading source of information for anime and manga industry professionals and fans alike. Join the ANN team to learn how we bring you everything you need to know, straight from Japan.

title: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Special Panel featuring Yugo Kanno
description: Celebrate the highly anticipated STEEL BALL RUN JoJo's Bizarre Adventure with a special panel featuring acclaimed composer Yugo Kanno, Daman Mills and Kaiji Tang! Experience a special live performance, plus a conversation with the guests you won't want to miss.

title: BLOW Brass
description: Together since 2020, BLOW Brass is an 8-piece brass band comprised of members that have recorded with Beyoncé, Karol G, John Williams, Herbie Hancock, and many others. Combining the modern with the retro and jazz with pop, BLOW transforms well-loved anime openings into something new and exciting.

title: Kodansha Presents: Blue Lock Creators Muneyuki Kaneshiro and Yusuke Nomura
description: Kodansha presents a conversation with Muneyuki Kaneshiro & Yusuke Nomura — the egoist creators behind the wildly popular manga and anime, Blue Lock. Enter this panel as lumps of talent to be shaped by Kaneshiro & Nomura's discussion about their process, highs & lows of manga serialization, & more!

title: Let's Make A Cosplay Pattern!
description: Join Kira and Ari of award-winning Kirari Cosplay for a fun, interactive workshop on making a basic cosplay pattern out of plastic wrap, masking tape, and sharpies! We'll walk you through the basics and help you make a basic pattern of your choice that you can take home with you!

title: Eating Orcs, Rooming with Cats: Ecocriticism and Anime Studies - JAMS Keynote
description: JAMS' Keynote Speaker, Daniel Ambord, delivers an academic lecture about anime, ecology, and eco-criticis

title: Cosplay Crash Course: From Idea to Execution
description:
This cosplay crash course breaks down the process from concept to completion. Topics include character selection, material choices, build planning, and key techniques to help create cohesive, well-executed cosplays.
*Presented by AX26 Cosplay Senpai Mega Mite

title: Allie Violin
description:
Since graduating with a Bachelor's in Music (Violin performance) in 2018, Allie has become an established musician in the Salt Lake City music scene. She has performed with various artists, including Kurt Bestor, Jon Batiste, Olivia Rodrigo, Lindsey Stirling, and more.

As she loves to play video games and watch anime in her free time, Allie enjoys combining her passions by arranging and performing electric violin covers from her favorite franchises. She's especially excited to bring her arrangements to the Anime Expo stage!

title: Dokibird's AX Birthday Bash 2026 with the Sloppy SIsters
description: Join Dokibird as she celebrates her birthday at Anime Expo! With special guests from the Sloppy Sisters!

title: Delicious in Data: Anime Market Research with FanserveUs
description: The consumer insights team at FanserveUs presents all-new data on what fans are watching and what audiences want to see, read, and collect more of. Join us for a palate-cleansing side quest into the techniques and developments shaping research in fandom and market analytics, then flex your smarts and win a treat in our lightning round quiz!

title: Gunpla 101: A Beginner's Guide to Plastic Model Kits!
description: Whether you're a fan of Gundam or a fan of building things, this panel is for you. We'll teach you all about the basics, from deciphering grades, reading manuals, and what tools you'll need. We'll also be raffling out a kit to get you started on your building journey. So kick back, learn a little and join the wonderful world of Gunpla building!

title: The Basics of Boxing Defense with Mizuki Hiruta
description: Join Reigning WBO World Super Flyweight Champion Mizuki Hiruta for a fun, family-friendly introduction to boxing-inspired movement. This no-contact workshop focuses on balance, footwork, and defensive coordination. Participants will learn how boxers train their bodies through simple, guided exercises that are easy to follow at any age or experience level. Along the way, watch as Mizuki shares insights from her journey and demonstrates how discipline and mindset shape performance.

title: None Like Joshua
description: Imagine your favorite anime theme songs remixed into the hottest EDM beats with a high-energy, captivating rap about that anime for one incredible, interactive concert experience!

title: Crunchyroll Showcase
description: Whether you're a lifelong anime fan or just getting started, Crunchyroll brings you closer to the action with sneak peeks, studio spotlights, announcements, and surprises along the way.

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: Naginata an Anime Polearm Workshop
description: Learn how to fight with a naginata, the weapon used by One Piece's White Beard, JJK's Maki, and KPop Demon Hunter's Mira. We will cover basic techniques, stances, and fighting combos. Gear will be provided and the workshop will be instructed by US national champions. All ages welcome!

title: What's New From Inklore
description: Join the team from Inklore and discover your next obsession at this sneak peek at what's new and upcoming on our list of best-in-class manga, manhwa, and global pop comics!

title: KAIJU GIRL CARAMELISE: The Kaiju-Sized?! North American Premiere
description: High school girl × Kaiju?! This over-the-top romantic comedy is finally stomping its way into AX! Join us for a special screening of Ep 1 and the North American Premiere of Ep 2. Featuring exclusive giveaways and a Kaiju-sized stage packed with laughs and love!

title: [U.S. PREMIERE] The Jaadugar: A Witch in Mongolia with Science SARU
description: Join us for the grand U.S. premiere of Episodes 1 and 2, featuring special guests Executive Director Naoko Yamada, Director Abel Góngora (Science SARU), and more! Be the first to learn exclusive behind-the-scenes details exploring the series' world, themes, and unique setting.

title: niccodilly
description: Cosplay vocalist niccodilly is making her first appearance at Anime Expo as one of the most iconic anime bassist ---- Mio Akiyama from K-ON!. Featuring beloved anisongs and J-rock hits from the 2000s-2010s, get ready for a nostalgic anisong experience with live vocals, cosplay and bass guitar (!?)

title: Sonic the Hedgehog Animated Shorts: A Frame-by-Frame Retrospective
description: Peek into the world of SEGA's short-form animation as we celebrate 35 years of Sonic the Hedgehog. Join Sonic Creative Director Takashi Iizuka, Austin Keys, and Jasmin Hernandez, with special guests Tyson Hesse, Evan Stanley, and Alan Wan to discuss their creative processes.

title: Bandai Namco Filmworks Industry Panel
description: Come join us as we talk about what's new and upcoming at Bandai Namco Filmworks with appearances from special guests!

title: K-Pop Dance Workshop
description: From BTS to Blackpink, there are a lot of iconic K-POP songs and dances! Now, you can learn one of these dances! Come and join us to learn one of these iconic K-POP choreographies as well as dance with other K-POP fans alike!

title: Bonsai Artistry
description: Eastern Leaf will host a bonsai workshop for registered attendees. Attendees will learn what a bonsai tree is and how to create one from raw plant material. The workshop includes materials to create a bonsai tree with instruction from Jason Chan, the owner of Eastern Leaf. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: A-1 Pictures Industry Panel
description: A-1 Pictures, the studio behind hits like Fate/strange Fake, MASHLE: MAGIC AND MUSCLES, and Sword Art Online, invites you to be among the first to watch their new series coming this summer, GROW UP SHOW -Sunflower Circus-! Plus, learn about the studio's other upcoming titles directly from the staff!

title: HATSUNE MIKU: COLORFUL STAGE! Fan Meeting at Anime Expo 2026
description: The hit rhythm game HATSUNE MIKU: COLORFUL STAGE! comes to Anime Expo for a special one-day fan meeting! Featuring Daisuke Hirose (voice of Tsukasa Tenma) and Machico (voice of Nene Kusanagi). Enjoy talk shows, music, and more. Don't miss it! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: The Art of Color and Character: A Live Drawing with Mika Pikazo
description: Join renowned character designer and illustrator Mika Pikazo for a special live panel and drawing demonstration! Explore her creative process, artistic inspirations, and career journey, followed by audience Q&A and a final artwork reveal.

title: Making Manga with VIZ Originals
description: Are you an aspiring mangaka? Meet the editors and mangaka behind VIZ Originals and One-Shots and discover how to publish your manga with VIZ. From writing to art, walk through the manga creation process! Plus, get advice on what's important to include when pitching your manga series or one-shot!

title: Witch Hat Atelier: A Magical Chat with the Cast and Creator
description: Step into the atelier! Let's take a magical look at Witch Hat Atelier behind-the-scenes with special guests: Kamome Shirahama (Manga Creator), Rena Motomura (Voice of Coco), and Natsuki Hanae (Voice of Qifrey). Learn what it takes to become a master witch in this exciting discussion!

title: Aimai Mirai
description: Dance, jump and rock out wtih Aimai Mirai as they perform fresh and classic Anisong for an unstoppable anime song concert! Hailing from San Francisco Bay Area, Aimai Mirai is a high energy anime cover band composed of five passionate cosplayers, musicians, and more!

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: Anime Pins - Collectors, Trade, & Swap
description: Join us as we meet up and share our love for the anime pin community and oogle at collections, trade, and swap!

title: The Ramparts of Ice Episode 14 Screening & Special Talk
description: Be among the first to see Episode 14 on the big screen right after its streaming premiere! Stay after the screening for a special talk with director MANQ and producer Yoko, who'll share behind-the-scenes stories and insights into the production. A surprise exclusive preview may be in store!?

title: WLL
description: WLL is a DJ and producer blending House, UK Garage, and electronic music with the energy of anime culture. Known for high-energy sets packed with anime edits, J-pop remixes, and euphoric club grooves, WLL transforms iconic fandom moments into dancefloor experiences. From Anime Expo to anime afterparties across the U.S., WLL brings together rave culture and anime fandom into one unforgettable vibe.

title: Studio KAI Anime “Sentenced to Be a Hero” Creator Talk Show
description: Join us for a special behind-the-scenes discussion with Studio KAI, the creators of Sentenced to Be a Hero! Discover the passion and secrets behind the creation of the action-driven stories, offering fresh perspectives. Don't miss out!

title: J-Novel Club Anime Expo 2026 Industry Announcements
description: Be among the first to see what's next! Join J-Novel Club at Anime Expo 2026 for exciting new manga and light novel license reveals! From fan favorites to surprise pickups, you won't want to miss it. Stick around for insights, live reactions, and a possible audience Q&A! 📚✨

title: To You in the Beyond: World Premiere & Special Guest Panel featuring Anna Nagase
description: Be among the first to experience the world premiere of To You in the Beyond, an animated film based on a novel by Akiko Abe, winner of the 2025 Japan Booksellers' Award for Cafune. The screening is followed by a talk with director Junichi Wada, voice actor Anna Nagase, and producer Koichiro Mukai.

title: Last Cloudia: First Official Panel
description: Be part of the acclaimed JRPG Last Cloudia's 7th anniversary celebrations—join the developers, AIDIS, for a panel discussion to mark their first ever Anime Expo appearance! Attendees will get exclusive original merch and a sneak peek at upcoming releases.

title: "Kagurabachi" Anime World Tour – World Premiere Screening at Anime Expo
description: Weekly Shonen Jump's Kagurabachi is getting a TV anime adaptation! Join us for the world premiere screening of the first 20 minutes of Episode 1 followed by a special panel discussion with the staff and cast. They will be sharing their passion for the series and taking you behind the scenes!

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

description: Join Kazuo Maekawa (Ace Attorney) for a hands-on introduction to Japanese manga creation. Learn character design, paneling, and storytelling, then create your own 4-panel comic. Open to all skill levels. Presented by JAPAN HOUSE Los Angeles.

title: KADOKAWA Anime 10th Anniversary Panel: Re:ZERO, KONOSUBA, and Bungo Stray Dogs Producers Roundtable & Re:ZERO S4 The Recapture Arc Ep 1 Premiere! (Supported by Crunchyroll)
description: Don't miss the exclusive Re:ZERO S4 The Recapture Arc Ep 1 Premiere! Celebrate 10 years of KADOKAWA Anime with the producers of Re:ZERO, KONOSUBA, and Bungo Stray Dogs. Enjoy behind-the-scenes stories and announcements for the next decade. Supported by Crunchyroll. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

description: Celebrate the world of Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle at Anime Expo 2026 on July 3 at the Peacock Theater! Join us for a special event looking back on the theatrical release of Infinity Castle, featuring guests Natsuki Hanae (Japanese voice of Tanjiro Kamado), Takahiro Sakurai (Japanese voice of Giyu Tomioka), and making her Anime Expo debut, Saori Hayami (Japanese voice of Shinobu Kocho). Fans of studio ufotable won't want to miss a special video of Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle! Also, fans won't want to miss seeing the latest footage from ufotable's newest film project!

title: BL Comics Label "GUSH COMICS" Industry Panel
description: Come and learn more about BL (Boy's love) manga and enjoy exclusive announcements from KAIOHSHA, the publisher behind GUSH COMICS, one of the leading BL comic labels in Japan. Join us for a deep dive into the world of BL with insights from the Japanese publishing industry and more!

title: Demon Slayer Trivia
description: Come play a game of Demon Slayer trivia! Attendees will be called to answer a trivia question and if you're correct, you win a prize! Come test your knowledge! Hosted by @mia.whorror

title: Dark Horse Manga
description: Dark Horse Manga returns to Anime Expo! Join us as we celebrate our 40th anniversary--38 of those spent publishing manga! Also, learn about the past, present & future of Dark Horse Manga--including multiple exciting new manga license announcements! Panel attendees will also receive a free poster, and have the opportunity to score some manga prizes!

title: Catbus Collective
description: NYC-based jazz band, Catbus Collective performs unique covers of anime, Ghibli, and City Pop classics. Ranging from Sailor Moon to Jujutsu Kaisen, the audience will hear their favorite anime openers, closers, and soundtracks in an exciting musical presentation with plenty of burning instrumental solos.

title: Blue Box Official Panel
description: Don't miss the official Blue Box panel with special guests Yoshino Aoyama (Japanese voice of Yumeka) and Zach Aguilar (English voice of Taiki)! Relive the most unforgettable moments from Season 1, get the latest information on Season 2, and score exclusive giveaways!

title: Making Games is Hard Part 3: Featuring Aleks Le and Special Guest
description: Rocket Panda Games returns with Volume 3 of its “Game Making” series, spotlighting Aleks Le and a special guest. Dive into an inside look at how the right voice can make or break a character, complete with live voice-over performances.

title: ZOA
description: ZOA is a Metalcore and bass music project from Denver Colorado.

title: Blue Archive & Beyond: A Special Panel by IO Division
description: To all our beloved Senseis, we've missed you! The IO Division is thrilled to announce our return to Anime Expo 2026. Let's make new memories with untold developer stories of Blue Archive, and step into the future as we unveil our highly anticipated new title. Join us for the next big adventure!

title: The Latest with Kotobukiya!
description: ARTFX J, BISHOUJO, Oshi Works, scale figures, model kits and more! Kotobukiya presents the latest product updates, first time reveals, and announcements. And as always there will be plenty of giveaways! Don't miss out!

description: A panel for the anime-dedicated FAST channel "Its Anime"! Please welcome Zeno Robinson and Caitlyn Elizabeth to dive deep into the appeal of their shows and their work as voice actors! We'll also be showing exclusive video and dropping some shocking news!!! If you love ANIME, VOICE-ACTORS and super cool GIVEAWAYS, you absolutely CANNOT miss this—come join the ultimate panel! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

description: Be the first to watch the BLACK TORCH Episode 1 subbed premiere presented by VIZ & Crunchyroll! Join special guests AJ Beckles (Jiro) and Keith Silverstein (Rago) for an exclusive screening, behind-the-scenes insights, and exciting giveaways as this supernatural action series ignites the stage.

title: GO-GO Jojo! A Jojo Game Show
description: Everything is a Jojo reference, and the stand user can be anyone! Join us for this interactive panel with prizes on the line! We talk about Jojo's Bizarre Adventure, pose like Jojo characters, and answer Jojo trivia. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Junji Ito Masterpiece Collection presented by Global Stage Hollywood & TV Tokyo
description: Junji Ito Masterpieces — A horror anthology from TV Tokyo, premiering July 2026. 17 dark masterpieces across 12 episodes. Presented by Global Stage Hollywood Film Festival. Panel & screening at Anime Expo ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

description: Join the Japanese voices of Yuru (Kensho Ono) and Asa (Yume Miyamoto), as they talk about their experiences with Daemons of the Shadow Realm, the latest anime based on the original story by the creator of Fullmetal Alchemist Hiromu Arakawa. Don't miss the chance to hear their thoughts behind from the recent season, and participate in an exclusive live dubbing for the Anime Expo audience!

title: pinponpanpon
description: pinponpanpon is a groundbreaking Japanese powerhouse boldly defying traditional idol norms. Created by French Cries and featuring members Domenatsu, Tokyo, and Katherine, the group has replaced the standard J-pop blueprint with a rebellious, dynamic movement designed for the global stage.

title: Faith in The Glitch
description: Faith in the Glitch has been a resident DJ for the nationally touring Future Funk party Yoi Toki, sharing stages with artists like Yung Bae, Saint Pepsi, and Macross 82-99. A lifelong anime nerd with a deep love for the culture, FitG blends anime edits, nostalgic mashups, fresh scratching, and high-energy party vibes into unforgettable sets. With decades behind the decks, Faith in the Glitch has rocked crowds at Otakon, Katsucon, Sakura-Con, and more—bringing convention energy and dance floor chaos wherever they go. Now, FitG is ready to bring that same energy west to Anime Expo in Los Angeles.

title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 — Welcome Back to Night City! (18+)
description: Get ready for Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2! This brand-new, standalone story will show an even more brutal, raw, and painfully human side of Night City, so join us live to hear directly from voice actors and creators of the series, and brace yourself for what's to come. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Design Your Own Stoneware Piece
description: Join us at the 2026 Anime Expo for a paint-your-own pottery workshop. This workshop is a great way to get creative, create a one-of-a-kind keepsake from the Expo, and, as a bonus, you get time to rest your feet after a long day of exploring. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

description: Are you planning a trip to Tokyo or curious about what cosplay is like there? Come learn about the best places to buy supplies, popular events and photography spaces, and the rules of cosplay culture in Japan!

description: Ham Sandwich is one of the fastest rising artists in the underground rap ecosystem -- especially within the anime & nerdcore rap scenes. Quietly amassing over 100 million streams across all platforms, Ham has proved that his unique blend of wit, cheekiness, character, and heart has legs.

Join Hyung-seok Kim, director of CZN and Epic Seven, as he shares an honest behind-the-scenes look at the values that those who love animation refuse to give up on. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

description: Feel the power of "BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai" in real life with the team behind the anime. Featuring special guests and a fun challenge, be prepared for an action-packed experience! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

description: NINJ3FF3C7 is an Atlanta-based DJ and producer specializing in anime-inspired EDM, blending iconic anime tracks and Vocaloid with bass house, dubstep, and drum & bass. NINJ3FF3C7 delivers high-energy sets that bridge anime culture with club environments for both niche and mainstream audiences.

title: From Digital Manga to Anime: Inside C'moA Comics' Latest Adaptations & Fan Screening

This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

Kizuna AI herself will perform a DJ set featuring her original EDM tracks and remixes of her popular songs, including a live performance. Don't miss this chance to see Kizuna AI at a stage at Anime Expo!

description: Join Crunchyroll and NTV as they bring out some special guests Aoi Yuki and Takeo Otsuka from Japan to talk about the hit anime series, The Apothecary Diaries! Hear directly from the talent and more!

description: An unhinged 18+ throwdown with the Big 3 and Dragon Ball (Z/Super), plus a messy debate on the ‘new Big 3.' This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: KYKY
description:
KYKY is an energetic bass sound designer/producer known for high-energy sets that unite diverse crowds through movement and music.

Under the mentorship of multiple well-known San Diego DJs and producers, he's gained invaluable knowledge and stage experience from the vibrant nightlife scene. He then expanded his audience nationally, touring with Canadian EDM Artist ALEX KADE, granting him to play for hundreds of people at well known venues across the US.

Our staff will also be presenting our newest license announcements, and answer questions from the audience if time permits. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

description: Curious about the spicier side of the gaming industry? Join us for a humorous but informative evening discussing all the latest developments with Denpasoft. With her music reaching fan worldwide she has amassed a strong following worldwide and over a million streams overall. Her upbeat personality and music always gets the crowd moving and having a good time.

He gained popularity for creating unique and nostalgic remixes that transport listeners to their favorite gaming and animated worlds which garnered him a dedicated fanbase across various online platforms.

In this panel we'll be discussing your OTP is true luv or mirror and fog. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel.***

Whether yours is just getting off the ground, totally finished, or still just an idea, we're here to offer some advice from folks just about seen it all. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel.***

Blending jazz, orchestral textures, and modern grooves, the group transforms beloved soundtracks into concert experiences. With a focus on musical storytelling and emotional depth, Studio Phoebe connects audiences to the worlds and characters they love while showcasing the artistry and global impact of Japanese pop culture.

description: After a long day at con theres nothing like a BL... themed game of BINGO?! Swing by! We give great reccomendations of new and old BL alike and have fun questions and quizes. Meet other fujin like yourself and more! ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

With a growing presence and a focus on authenticity, NTXC continues to build a reputation as a versatile and engaging artist, connecting with audiences through both sound and energy.

description: NYC-based jazz band, Catbus Collective performs unique covers of anime, Ghibli, and City Pop classics. description: Learn the step by step origami basics of folding paper. Fold a claw for your finger, a swan, a jet plane and a hopping frog.

description: It's been 10 years for both of these two shows! Luck is a war veteran who held the line for 10 years, and the only thing he kills now is time… and Bananya is a silly cat. Join us for two early screenings of I Became a Legend after My 10 Year-Long Last Stand and Banaya 10th Anniversary! I Became a Legend after My 10 Year-Long Last Stand - Episode 1-2. Banaya 10th Anniversary - Episode 1
