The panel will also feature an "Interactive Cult Quiz" where you can win autographed items directly from the directors, and a "Q&A session" with the creators! July 4th at 12 PM, at the Crypto.com Arena. Don't miss this historic moment in anime!

title: Touzan Taiko Drumming Workshop
description: Experience the dynamic sound of Touzan Taiko, Cal Poly Pomona's Japanese drumming group, as they present a live performance followed by an introductory taiko workshop! Through powerful rhythms, synchronized movement, and spirited performance, Touzan Taiko showcases the energy, discipline, and sense of community at the heart of taiko drumming.

title: Physics of Anime
description: Join 3 NASA scientists for one-part physics lecture, and one-part geek-out session. For the Closing Seminar of the JAMS@AX symposium, math, science, and anime will combine to reveal the Physic of Anime! Thanks for another INCREDIBLE JAMS@AX!

title: Drecom Industry Panel w/ Makoto Furukawa and Daiki Yamashita from BLADE & BASTARD
description: With voice actors Makoto Furukawa (V.A of Iarumas) and Daiki Yamashita (V.A of Raraja) as special guests, we'll be hosting a talk session about “BLADE & BASTARD” anime. We'll also share the latest updates on Drecom, including titles with TV anime currently in production! Please come and join us!

title: Breaking the Frame: Studio Orange from TRIGUN STARGAZE, BEASTARS, and more
description: Expanding anime storytelling through 3DCG. Join Studio Orange for an inside look at creating dynamic emotion, expressive character acting, and cinematic action, with production insights from TRIGUN STARGAZE, BEASTARS, and Ensemble Stars!! Masterpiece MV—and how these ideas continue to shape the studio's work.

title: LJT
description:
LJT is a project team made of professionally-trained dancers who love to perform.
With experience across international stages and tours, and roots in both the community and industry, we come together to bring that energy into a space that's all about having fun and putting on a great show.

title: NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE IRL Event
description: Are you ready to gaze upon the greatest "Internet Angel" to captivate the world wide web? Welcome our special guests (including the voice of KAngel) as they look back on the world of NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE and delve into this chaotic internet of the modern day!

title: Black Clover Season 2 Premiere Panel with Cast and Staff
description: Join Gakuto Kajiwara (Voice of Asta) and Ayataka Tanemura (Director) for the premiere of the first episode of Black Clover Season 2! Be among the first to witness the continuing saga of Asta's journey to become the Wizard King!

title: Exclusive First Look: Norihiro Naganuma ("The Apothecary Diaries") Unveils His New Action-Packed Original Series - Avex Pictures Panel
description: Come join us at AX for the first ever reveal of Director Norihiro Naganuma's (Director of "The Apothecary Diaries") brand new series! There will be a panel discussion, promotional videos and visuals for this completely original, action-packed series along with a Q&A with the director himself!

title: From Cosplay to Curtain Call
description: Cosplay and the performing arts have always intersected. Curious about acting but unsure where to begin? Join a trained actress with 14 years' experience for an introduction to auditions, prep, training opportunities, voice acting resources, and performance skills to level up your cosplay content.

title: Allie Violin
description:
Since graduating with a Bachelor's in Music (Violin performance) in 2018, Allie has become an established musician in the Salt Lake City music scene. She has performed with various artists, including Kurt Bestor, Jon Batiste, Olivia Rodrigo, Lindsey Stirling, and more.

As she loves to play video games and watch anime in her free time, Allie enjoys combining her passions by arranging and performing electric violin covers from her favorite franchises. She's especially excited to bring her arrangements to the Anime Expo stage!

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: Studio TRIGGER Panel 2026
description: Studio TRIGGER is BACK at AX 2026! Join the director and scriptwriter of Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 for behind-the-scenes insights into the upcoming anime! We'll also share the latest updates on our current projects… and unveil our next flagship title!

title: SodaPop
description: Formed by five jazz and rock instrumentalists who met through college and high school communities, SodaPop is a music project based between San Diego, CA and Cleveland, OH rooted in a deep appreciation for Japanese pop culture. The project interprets the emotional and musical depth of J-POP, anime and video games music into conversations with cohesive jazz interplay and the drive of instrumental rock. Original arrangements, reimagined classics, and spontaneous improvisation: that's when music transcends the recording and becomes a living expression of SodaPop's own.

title: Tokyo Revengers: War of the Three Titans Arc – 3-Star Cast Panel & Special Recap Video
description: The final revenge begins at Anime Expo! Join Yuki Shin (TAKE-MITCHY), Yuu Hayashi (Mikey), and Masaya Fukunishi (Draken) for a “Tokyo Revengers” panel featuring an exclusive recap video and behind-the-scenes stories from the cast. Grab a special giveaway while supplies last!

title: Anime Expo Plushie Making Workshop Hosted by The Plushie Workshop
description: Create your very own Plushumi The Plushie Workshop plushie at Anime Expo 2026! Choose between our adorable White Bear or Beige Bunny and bring your plushie to life through stuffing, assembly, and customization. You'll even get to see our signature knitting devices in action and try them yourself! ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: Echoheart
description: Echoheart is a Los Angeles-based anisong and J-pop cover band dedicated to bringing the world of anime music to life. Inspired by iconic anime bands and soundtracks, the group combines live musicianship with cosplay and performance to recreate the excitement of seeing your favorite 2D bands on stage. From high-energy rock anthems to emotional ballads, Echoheart celebrates the music that connects anime fans around the world.

title: My Hero Academia 10th Anniversary Panel Hosted by TOHO animation
description: My Hero Academia hits its 10th anniversary! Join Daiki Yamashita (Deku) and Koki Uchiyama (Shigaraki) to celebrate this incredible milestone. Don't miss the world premiere of the short clip, ”I am a hero too"! Go beyond, Plus Ultra!

title: OceanVeil & Ascendent Animation Present: Special Screening and Behind the Mic — Live with English Voice Actors
description: Step into the fascinating world of voice acting with OceanVeil, a new streaming platform, and its partner studio, Ascendent Animation! Enjoy a special screening of a brand-new dubbed title and go behind the scenes to see how your favorite dubbed moments come to life—featuring English voice actors!

title: Detective Conan: The Million-dollar Pentagram U.S. Premiere Screening
description: Kid the Phantom Thief makes his grand debut at AX! Don't miss the U.S. premiere of Detective Conan: The Million-dollar Pentagram earning $150+ Million worldwide. Witness the dazzling battle of blades and illusions that thrilled fandom!

title: THE GHOST IN THE SHELL × Science SARU: Special Panel ＆ Premiere
description: The legendary cyberpunk series "THE GHOST IN THE SHELL" returns in a bold new form, brought to life by animation studio "Science SARU". We present the U.S. premiere screening from the new series. Staﬀ members will also share insights into the concept, and visual world behind the new series.

title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Special Panel
description: "That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime" Season 4 is underway! Miho Okasaki (Voice of Rimuru) and Megumi Toyoguchi (Voice of Raphael) from "SLIME" are coming to Anime Expo 2026!

title: Idol Summer Escape
description: Step into the dazzling world of idols from around the globe in this exclusive, up-close experience! Enjoy live performances and immerse yourself in the excitement of wotagei. Don't miss the rare chance to meet and connect with the idols, browse exclusive merch, and snap some adorable chekkis to remember the evening!

title: pinponpanpon
description: pinponpanpon is a groundbreaking Japanese powerhouse boldly defying traditional idol norms. Created by French Cries and featuring members Domenatsu, Tokyo, and Katherine, the group has replaced the standard J-pop blueprint with a rebellious, dynamic movement designed for the global stage.

title: Masters of Anime: Exploring Japanese Animation Production
description: Hear behind-the-scenes stories from legendary anime creators Moriyasu Taniguchi, Ryosuke Takahashi, and Toru Yoshida, whose careers span over half a century. Explore the past, present, and future of Japanese anime production through the eyes of industry masters with MyAnimeList staff.

title: Ins and Outs of International Cosplay Competitions
description: Are you a cosplay enthusiast looking to take the next step in your competitive cosplay career? Learn what it takes to achieve success in the preliminary and final rounds of the international competitive opportunities available from two-time USA representative and AX26 Cosplay Senpai Chikkupea.

title:
Class is in session! 
Animation MasterClass with the Creative Staff behind Clevatess Season 2
description: The Japanese creative staff will provide insight into the creation and technical animation behind Clevatess paired with an early premiere of Episode 1 exclusively for our Anime Expo audience. Stay until the end for an extra special surprise ahead of Season 2!

title: "Thunder 3" Premiere Panel with Production Staff
description: Join us for the premiere screening of "Thunder 3" episodes 1-2! The production staff takes the stage to share behind-the-scenes stories, insights into the creative details poured into the animation, series highlights, and insider moments found only at Anime Expo!

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: I Was Transported To An Anime Convention But Now I Don't Know What To Wear! (Intro to Cosplay 101)
description: Want to try cosplaying but don't know where to start? Then join SuncakeMooncake Cosplay in this beginner-friendly panel and see what all the buzz is about! We'll discuss just what cosplay is, how to assemble your first outfit, and our favorite tips for wearing costumes and attending conventions!

title: Amuse Creative Studio Presents : New Anime Launch Event
description: A brand-new anime from the extraordinary world of Mika Pikazo—visionary creator and official guest of AX 2026—is finally here! Plus, a special appearance by the creators of ELECEED, sharing exclusive behind-the-scenes insights from webtoon to anime.

title: CloverWorks Industry Panel
description: The studio behind SPY x FAMILY, BOCCHI THE ROCK!, My Dress-Up Darling, The Fragrant Flower Blooms with Dignity, and many more, presents the CloverWorks Industry Panel! Don't miss the exclusive info and announcements from special guests visiting Anime Expo from CloverWorks!

title: Breaking Into Anime & Animation: How Studios Find and Hire Talent
description: Want to work in anime or animation? Industry insiders reveal how studios discover, recruit, and hire new talent. Producers, executives, and creative leaders discuss what anime and animation studios look for and how artists, writers, animators, and creators can break in.

title: Mikan Project
description:
Mikan Project is an online collective of musicians delivering a zesty sound to the Western J-Music scene. They have performed at major industry events, notable ones being Anime Expo and Anime Boston. Online, their tight horn section is a go-to for Vocaloid producers, cover artists, as well as both indie and corporate VTubers; contributing to a wide range of projects spanning original compositions, anime, and video game music.

Whether they're in the studio, supporting the show, or taking center stage, Mikan Project brings a citrus fresh energy that leaves a lasting impression.

title: FGO 9th Anniversary x TYPE-MOON Projects
description: It's Fate/Grand Order's 9th anniversary celebration! Join Aniplex of America's Albert Kao and special guests Ayako Kawasumi (Altria Pendragon and Anne Bonny) and Kana Ueda (Ishtar and Ereshkigal) to discuss FGO's past, present, and future along with other TYPE-MOON projects!

title: Bright Horizons: The Artistic Journey and Galaxic Baseball League of Acky Bright
description: Acky Bright returns to Anime Expo! Known for his McDonald's campaign, plus collaborations with DC, Marvel, and Red Bull, and his MLB Players–backed IP, GalaXic Baseball Leagure. Enjoy laughs with a comedian MC and score limited giveaways—don't miss it!

title: MARRIAGETOXIN Road to the Best Marriage! at Anime Expo
description: Come and join a special panel discussion featuring the main staff and cast of MARRIAGETOXIN. Join us as we dive deep into all the work and details that make this series so charming!

title: HIDIVE Presents “The Forsaken Saintess and Her Foodie Road Trip in Another World” North American Premiere & Q&A
description: Pitch a tent with HIDIVE for this simulcast premiere where being isekai'd meets gourmet, campfire cooking! Plus, savor a Q&A with special guest director Atsushi Nigorikawa!

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: That time I entered an all boys school and it got complicated: Hana-Kimi panel presented by Crunchyroll
description: Step into the beloved world of Hana-Kimi, where romance and outrageous school antics take center stage! Join special guests Aya Yamane, Japanese voice of Mizuki, and Kikunosuke Toya, Japanese voice of Nakatsu, for a lively discussion celebrating this iconic story of disguise, friendship, and first love. Hear behind-the-scenes insights, explore what makes the characters so enduring, and even see iconic scenes performed live!

title: VIZ Anime Panel
description: VIZ presents a powerhouse anime showcase with special guests Masakazu Morita and Johnny Yong Bosch (BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War), AJ Beckles and Keith Silverstein (BLACK TORCH), sharing behind-the-scenes stories. Fans won't want to miss exciting exclusive announcements revealed live!

title: Build Book Boot Camp
description: What the heck is a build book? What do you even put in it? And do they really expect you to explain your whole costume in 10 pages or less??? Get answers to these questions and more from AX 2025 Cosplay Senpai and build book enthusiast Luluko!

title: "Ascendance of Bookworm" And Your Next Obsession presented by ytv animation & YTE
description: Join YTV group for an exclusive behind-the-scenes journey into the world of their up and coming anime backed by WIT studio, 100studio, LIDENFILMS and more. Enjoy live drawing sessions, a special watch party featuring sneak peeks of exciting titles, meet special guests, and fun surprises. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: JAPAN MUSIC VOCALOID Powered by DWANGO
description:
JAPAN MUSIC VOCALOID Powered by Dwango at Anime Expo 2026! Get ready for an electrifying night celebrating the sound of Vocaloid with an incredible line-up of legendary DJs straight from Japan! This one-of-a-kind event brings together some of the most influential producers in the Vocaloid scene for an unforgettable live experience. Get ready for an electrifying night of beats, visuals, and pure Vocaloid energy with: Hachioji-P, kz(livetune), picco, SatapanP, and TeddyLoid (Special Appearance).

This will be a FREE ticketed event. Head to the Ticketing booth to pick up your free ticket on July 4, 2026.

title: The Best Manga for Classrooms & Libraries
description: Keeping current with the most popular manga & anime can be tough—especially for busy librarians & educators. From age-appropriate starter manga, to anime-inspiring hits, join this panel of manga pros & experts eager to help with recommendations & resources perfect for any growing manga section!

title: Omoi Manga Industry Panel
description: Omoi (omoi.com) is a manga app and publisher that provides easy access to hundreds of series, including Hikaru in the Light!, Natsume & Natsume, and The Elf Husband and Dwarf Wife. Meet the team and learn about our upcoming digital + print releases, app features, and more. We'll have prizes too!

title: Kazuki Tokaji
description: Kazuki Tokaji is a Japanese guitarist based between Los Angeles and Tokyo, blending dynamic 7-string guitar with anime and video game-inspired melodies and modern metal intensity. An official ESP Guitars artist, he delivers high-energy performances that connect with fans worldwide.

title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End - Special Event Hosted by TOHO animation
description: Join the "Frieren: Beyond Journey's End " panel! Director Tomoya Kitagawa, Supporting Director Keiichiro Saito, and Animation Producer Yuichiro Fukushi look back at Season 2 and discuss the upcoming Season 3, with a live drawing by Character Designer Keisuke Kojima. See what's next for Frieren!

title: JooHee
description: JooHee (@musicbyjoohee) is a Korean-American YouTube artist and cosplayer performing anime and game music. With a global audience, her top covers include "I Really Want to Stay at Your House" from Cyberpunk, "Dark Aria" from Solo Leveling, and Naruto's "Blue Bird."

title: How to study Japanese in Japan with Go! Go! Nihon
description: You dream of moving to Japan? At Go! Go! Nihon, we have helped over 17,000 people from all over the world live in Japan and learn Japanese at a language school. In this panel we will share everything you need to know about our free service and how to get started.

title: Crunchyroll Presents: Firefly Wedding and The Ogre's Bride (18+)
description: Firefly Wedding: On the surface, Satoko has it all—she's beautiful, the daughter of a nobleman, and at a prime age for marriage. Unfortunately, she is also quite ill and only has a short time left to live. Before she can secure a marriage that will redeem her worth in her family's eyes, she finds herself the target of the mysterious assassin Shinpei, and her plans are put in jeopardy. In order to save herself, she makes a desperate proposal—of marriage! When it comes to love, however, Shinpei takes “until death do we part” seriously. The Ogre's Bride: The ayakashi and humans coexist in harmony. The ayakashi, having superior abilities and beautiful appearances, sometimes find their partner among human women, making them their ""bride"". The bride, in exchange for bringing prosperity, receives absolute love from the ayakashi. Yuzu is constantly compared to her sister, a bride of a demon fox, and is resented by her family every day. One day, when Yuzu just couldn't take things anymore, a man appeared before her on a bridge. This man is the most beautiful man Yuzu has ever seen... and he's calling her his wife?! The most powerful, ""cold-hearted"" ayakashi is pouring his heart out for Yuzu?! Join us for two early screenings of Firefly Wedding and The Ogre's Bride! ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will not be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Ironmouse & CDawgVA: Chaos Ascendant – AX V
description: The saga continues! Ironmouse and CDawgVA are back at AX for their fourth chaotic showdown. Bring on your questions and show off your best cosplays! You don't want to miss the kind of unpredictable energy that's made their panels legendary. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Good Smile Company presents Hatsune Miku Exclusive Showcase 2026
description: Join Chairman Takanori Aki & Kahotan & feel the energy at Good Smile Company's Official Hatsune Miku panel! Be there for a worldwide reveal of an all-new special Miku project, latest figure updates, a high-speed look at Racing Miku & GOODSMILE RACING, & a chance to win special prizes—don't miss it!

title: Where to go in Japan: Anime and manga based tourism
description: Planning a trip to Japan? Discover real-world locations from anime and manga. Then find yourself standing next to a giant robot, eating in themed cafes, snapping pictures of character statues, and spending all day at manga and anime museums. You will have a full itinerary of all things nerdy! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: The Oblivious Saint Can't Contain Her Power Special Premiere
description: Don't miss your chance to be among the first to watch the premiere of the second episode of The Oblivious Saint Can't Contain Her Power! Featuring special guests from Japan, cast members Rie Takahashi and Makoto Furukawa share their thoughts on the new anime series and invite you to enjoy the premiere!

title: Seven Seas Industry Panel
description: Seven Seas Entertainment is an award-winning publisher that specializes in bringing the best of Japanese manga and light novels to English-language audiences, alongside the hottest danmei, webtoons, and other books from around the globe. Join us for news, announcements, and more in this exciting industry panel! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Cosplay Summer Camp!
description: Ever wished you could go to a summer camp just for anime lovers? Well wish no more! In the second installment of Cosplay Summer Camp we'll be making little crafts to swap with other people! As usual we'll be adding a fun nerd-y twist to it, so be ready to laugh, have fun, and make new friends! ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: DEBATE TIME! HOT SHOUNEN TAKES
description: Hosted by the so-called King of Shounen from a viral anime street interview, Galaxy Shogun ignites Debate Time. Is Kakashi a failed mentor? Is Demon Slayer boring and overhyped? No safe opinions, no mercy—only the hottest Shounen takes and crowd chaos. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Beyond the Trigger: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners and the Evolution of Wuthering Waves
description: Join us for an exclusive double-feature! First, the untold story behind the Cyberpunk: Edgerunners collaboration. Then, Fast Travel Unlocked: a retrospective of Wuthering Waves, from its storytelling to the character arcs that shaped its era. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: From Page to Cosplay! How Black Girls Redefine Iconic Anime Characters
description: Black girls are taking center stage in the cosplay world, bringing colors, culture, and confidence to characters that aren't always created with us in mind. For this panel, we will explore how Black cosplayers redefine iconic anime through a blend of creativity and cultural expression. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Anime Jeopardy
description: How well do you know your anime trivia? Come challenge other con-goers and see who knows more. Clues are taken from all eras of anime, from classics to the hottest shows currently airing. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel. This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Reborn as a Space Mercenary: I Woke Up Piloting the Strongest Starship! Premiere Screening featuring Makoto Furukawa
description: When Satou Takahiro is swept away from his ordinary life into the world of his favorite video game, a universe of space battles and danger awaits. Don't miss Crunchyroll's Anime Expo two-episode premiere of Reborn as a Space Mercenary: I Woke Up Piloting the Strongest Starship!, featuring a special guest appearance by Makoto Furukawa (Voice of Hiro / Satou Takahiro).

title: Anime Expo 2026 Masquerade
description: The AX Masquerade is Anime Expo's longest-running and most prestigious cosplay competition, where talented cosplayers will now take the Main Events stage at Crypto.com Arena to compete for incredible prizes and the coveted Best in Show title.

title: LJT (Opening performance at AX Masquerade)
description:
LJT is a project team made of professionally-trained dancers who love to perform.
With experience across international stages and tours, and roots in both the community and industry, we come together to bring that energy into a space that's all about having fun and putting on a great show.

title: Bluemoon Sanitizer (Halftime performance at AX Masquerade)
description: Bluemoon Sanitizer is a San Diego anime & game music cover band known for energetic live performances of anime openings, game soundtracks, and J-pop hits, performed with vibrant instrumentation and a passion for the anime community!

title: Mariachi Eclipse
description: Mariachi Eclipse is a mariachi ensemble that brings anime and video game music into a live performance setting. Rooted in traditional mariachi instrumentation, the group explores well-known Japanese soundtracks through a different musical lens while maintaining the character of both styles. Their performances focus on ensemble balance, musical detail, and a strong connection with the audience, creating a sound that feels both grounded and distinctive across cultural spaces.

title: Neo Sanctum
description: We are Neo Sanctum and we are a Touhou doujin music circle based in Toronto, producing both Touhou and Anime EDM, with a focus on drum & bass! We love both organize and play events in Toronto and we will be bringing our sound live as DJs at AX for the first time!

title: MIRESI: Invisible Future, Art Director Hyulla's Thicc Character Drawing Show (18+)
description: Art Director Hyulla, known for his work on Goddess of Victory: NIKKE! Join a live drawing show with a surprise guest as MIRESI's bishojo characters come to life on stage, plus a talk on the Art of Thicc Proportions. Enjoy our free limited-edition merch, too!

title: Love And Deepspace: Dating Games With Your Favorite Love Interests (18+)
description: Ready to risk it all for your (no longer pixelated) husbandos? From flirty questions to spicy scenarios, MCs shoot their shot in a collective delulu era. Come laugh, flirt, debate and maybe even embarrass yourself a little in this intergalactic romance. [This panel is not affiliated with INFOLD] ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: JAST: A 30th Anniversary Retrospective Featuring Itaru-sensei (18+)
description: Come listen to the folks at JAST talk about the Visual Novel industry, how it's changed over the years, and what it might look like going forward. With help (and live drawing!) from our special guest, Itaru Hinoue; founding member of Key, and artist behind Clannad, Air, and other works you love. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Savage Fight Scenes in Anime (18+)
description: Panel going over some of the most over the top violent scenes in numerous anime this panelist has encountered. Back for a second year of even more gory goodness! ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: KEN HARADA
description: Ken Harada is a distinguished music producer and DJ from Tokyo, Japan, who rose to prominence in the music industry with his production of Ayumi Hamasaki's iconic hit, Duty, which sold over 3 million copies and won a Japan Record Award for Best Album. Known for his collaborations with major Japanese artists like EXILE, BoA, Kumi Koda, Ami Suzuki, SKE48, TM Revolution and many more.

title: Late Comedy Showdown (18+)
description: Which comedian will hold the championship title for LCS? Watch the finalists compete in a night full of endless laughter! ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Horror/Thriller/Dark Anime (18+)
description: Back for year five! Join our open discussion on horror, thriller, and dark anime, manga, and light novels as we navigate through the decades. Share hidden gems and classics alike while connecting with others to explore the darker side of storytelling. All fans and newcomers welcome! ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: “Hyung,” he said: Bringing Korean BL Novels to English (18+)
description: In Korean stories, a word like “hyung” can convey character, relationship, and emotion all at once. Join Publang as we explore how we balance cultural nuance, authorial voice, and natural readability in our localization process across our catalog, from shifter rom-com to sweeping military drama. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: FAKKU Industry Panel (18+)
description: FAKKU is the largest independent manga publisher in the United States! They have released thousands of manga, games, and anime and quickly became the largest English hentai publisher in the world. Join FAKKU as they talk about their history, current projects, and brand new announcements. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Welksie
description: Welksie is an LA-based producer/DJ passionate about musical storytelling, emotional journeys, and challenging expectations. Weaving EDM/Bass/J-Pop in concert with hand-synced anime visuals, Welksie's unique sound and “live-AMV” aesthetic aim to break down barriers between music and cultures alike.

title: Jase Cloud
description: Jase Cloud is a multi-format music producer and DJ from San Diego, California. Over the years, he has developed his sound based on a unique blend of Bass House, Trap, and Hard Dance. Jase Cloud lives to keep things interesting by incorporating a wide range of EDM genres in his DJ sets but has a history in curating music spanning Hip-Hop, R&B, and House. Jase Cloud has made much of his notoriety from his stellar DJ sets at many anime and K-pop themed raves across the country. He strives to grow further in his musical style and creation as well as bringing non-stop, high energy to his DJ performances.

title: Hear Me Out Weeb Edition (18+)
description: Do you have a really embarrassing anime crush? Did you think Panda was hotter than Gojo? Does Zooble make you blush? We want to know! Come give us your best “hear me out” and see if you're alone in your love or if your take is based! UwU ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Garage Kits: The Reality of Becoming a Model Painter - A Veteran's Experience. (18+)
description: Curious about garage kits? Get the unfiltered reality from a 20 year veteran. What it takes before the final photos, the mistakes, the challenges, and what it really means to grow as a painter and artist. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Performative Mc Panel (18+)
description:
In a world of Mc (main characters) who's the real deal and who's performing for a audience?
Join us as we jump into the world of anime series dissecting your favorite protagonist and by audience voting we'll decide if they're the real deal or performative. Let's decide where the lines blur! ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Black Crystal
description:
We are a Japanese-American melodic metal band inspired by anime culture, creating original songs and powerful anime covers in our signature high-energy, fast-paced style.

Our music feels like an epic anime opening cinematic, emotional, and full of spirit. Through our sound, we aim to spread the passion, positivity, and strength of anime culture to a wider audience.

title: Boys Love and Fujoshi: History and Influence in Modern Fandom (18+)
description: Fujoshi have been a part of fandom since conception. Fans of BL (Boys Love), they have built the genre up from humble shoujo manga and glamrock doujin beginnings into a massive industry. Join us for a deep dive into fujo culture, the history of BL, and the current state of the 2d gay boy industry. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Lobotomy Kaisen (18+)
description: Gege Akutami had captured and crushed the hearts of millions when writing Jujutsu Kaisen. This has created the fandom subsect, Lobotomy Kaisen. We will go over its history; the cursed memes created and discuss how it is a coping mechanism and a way to gain partial ownership of the characters. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: For the love of Josei manga! (18+)
description: Josei manga has embedded itself in the hearts of women around the world. Covering mature themes, career struggles, romances, motherhood, marriages, and even divorce, it is not simply “hentai for women”. See why Josei manga is beloved, our favorite series, and why it gets confused with shōjo manga. ***This room will NOT be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: MEIRLIN
description:
Tokyo-born and LA-based, MEIRLIN is an international DJ and producer known for her high-energy main-stage house and techno sound.

She has released charting tracks on leading labels including Revealed, Smash The House, and Protocol, earning support from Hardwell, Dimitri Vegas & Like Mike, Nicky Romero, and more. Her 2024 single “Spaceflight 2099” premiered by Hardwell at Ultra Miami and surpassed 500,000 streams. A former resident at Zouk Las Vegas and part of Insomniac's artist since 2019, MEIRLIN has performed at top venues worldwide and continues to build global momentum across the U.S., Asia, and Europe.

title: Neujack The Demigod
description: Neujack is a Los Angeles-based electronic music producer, DJ, and digital artist known for blending heavy electro-house, hyperpop, and breakcore with anime/gaming influences. He is also called "Neujack the Demigod" and creates visual-heavy, high-energy, and often lofi-influenced, music.

title: Khaimera
description: Khaimera is an LA-Based DJ/Producer blending EDM, Anime, and Video Game sounds into high energy sets. Known for EDM and Anime remixes and rave edits, he delivers nostalgic, and high energy performances where gaming and rave culture collide.

title: NTXC
description: Starting in 2015, NTXC is an electronic music artist known for delivering high-energy, immersive DJ sets that blend elements of hardstyle, techno, and bass music. With a growing presence and a focus on authenticity, NTXC continues to build a reputation as a versatile and engaging artist, connecting with audiences through both sound and energy.

title: DJMACHINEGOD
description: DJMACHINEGOD is an anikura DJ currently residing in the San Francisco Bay Area, playing dubstep, hardcore, and hard dance remixes of popular anime or idol music. His main passion is anime horse girls and has spent hundreds, and possibly even thousands more on Uma Musume. He has performed at nightclubs, local events, anime festivals, and online shows throughout the Bay Area and aims to bring the fattest drops to any anikura set.

title: Studio Phoebe
description: Studio Phoebe is a live band dedicated to reimagining anime, Studio Ghibli, and video game music. Blending jazz, orchestral textures, and modern grooves, the group transforms beloved soundtracks into concert experiences. With a focus on musical storytelling and emotional depth, Studio Phoebe connects audiences to the worlds and characters they love while showcasing the artistry and global impact of Japanese pop culture.

title: AMV Awards
description: Celebrate the best in anime and music fusion at the Anime Expo 2026 Anime Music Video (AMV) Competition Awards! Join us as we unveil the winners across various categories, showcasing exceptional artistry, storytelling, and technical prowess.

title: How to Become a Manga Professional & Stay Sane Doing It
description: From editing, marketing, translation, production, sales & more, learn about the many ways to start a career in the exciting (but exhausting) manga industry! Join this panel of veteran manga pros ready to discuss how they got their start, how you can too, & how we all can survive the experience.

title: Con Crunch Survival Guide
description: Are you always rushing to finish your cosplays at the last minute? Do you show up to conventions sleepless and covered in hot glue? If so, you're not alone! Learn how to avoid the dreaded con crunch and manage your time when deadlines get tight at this fun and interactive panel!

title: Voices, Games, and IP: An Industry Talk with Jimmie Yamaguchi
description: Learn more about the gaming and voice acting industry! Voice actor Jimmie Yamaguchi (Zenless Zone Zero, 2XKO, Star Wars) is joined by game industry veteran Chris Harada (Square Enix, Gearbox, and more) and Audrey, CEO of Japan-based Aitai Japan, to discuss how voices, games, and IP come together—from performance and production to global releases.

title: JUJUTSU KAISEN: Celebrating 5 Years of Curses with Cast Hosted by TOHO animation
description: JUJUTSU KAISEN 5th Anniversary Panel – celebrating five thrilling years of this blockbuster anime! Reflect on its journey so far, including Season 3, key battles, story milestones, and character moments. Hear behind-the-scenes stories and enjoy fan experiences you won't want to miss! ***This room WILL be cleared for the next panel.***

title: Riot Games: Bringing Teamfight Tactics to Life!
description: Join us for a special behind-the-scenes look at how the team delivers each Set, including the creative process from concept to live gameplay, and how the team prepares for future Sets. We will also have a dedicated Q&A to get to know our panelists!

title: TOKYOPOP Industry Panel
description: TOKYOPOP Presents: An industry panel all about the latest and greatest from TOKYOPOP! Join us as we unveil news about upcoming releases, licensing announcements, and more!

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: Walt's Footsteps- The Osamu Tezuka Story
description: Join The American Anime Otaku as he takes a look at the careers of two legendary animators and how they indirectly influenced each other and the medium of Japanese animation.

title: Awai
description: Awai is an Idol and singer-songwriter currently based in Tokyo Japan, she is credited for doing vocals for J-Pop duo YOASOBI on songs such as PLAYERS and HEART BEAT. Awai puts on an engaging show full of upbeat anime and Jpop classics as well as original songs featuring Japanese and English lyrics.

title: Kodansha House
description: A wildly popular immersive pop-up experience presented in partnership with Anime Expo, taking place July 2–12 in the heart of Little Tokyo. Visit us at 701 E. 3rd Street and step into a one-of-a-kind anime experience.

title: Anime Trending Industry Panel
description: Join the team from Anime Trending, the industry recognized platform for Top 10 anime rankings/charts, awards, news and more! The team has worked on promoting hit titles like Delicious in Dungeon, Re:ZERO, 【OSHI NO KO】, and more, helping bring these titles to fans outside of Japan.

title: HIDIVE Presents “Hell Mode Season 2” Dub World Premiere
description: Life on hard mode is a total grind! Kenichi Yamada leaps at the chance to try out a game with a “Hell Mode” difficulty but finds himself reborn in the game! Join HIDIVE for the 2nd season dub premiere of the isekai smash hit!

title: Cosplay Spelling Bee
description: From “thermoplastic” to “chiaroscuro,” how strong is your cosplay vocabulary? Step up to the mic for a cosplay-themed spelling bee where crafting knowledge meets friendly rivalry. Expect laughs, tricky words, and plenty of “wait… how do you spell that?” moments. Come compete or just enjoy the chaos!

title: niccodilly
description: Cosplay vocalist niccodilly is making her first appearance at Anime Expo as one of the most iconic anime bassist ---- Mio Akiyama from K-ON!. Featuring beloved anisongs and J-rock hits from the 2000s-2010s, get ready for a nostalgic anisong experience with live vocals, cosplay and bass guitar (!?)

title: Zenless Zone Zero - Signal Connect: Behind the Character
description: Step into the world of Zenless Zone Zero at our special voice actor panel, where the voices behind this urban fantasy action RPG bring its fast-paced combat and stylish, story-driven city to life through behind-the-scenes stories, live interactions, and exclusive insights.

title: J-Pop Dance Workshop
description: Get ready to dance like your favorite anime idols! Join us as we will go over a fun J-Pop dance routine that will have you dancing like your favorite performers! Bring your energy, and show us what you've got!

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: BIGWEST presents - The Super Dimension Fortress Macross: Do You Remember Love?
description: Experience the first official North American screening of The Super Dimension Fortress Macross: Do You Remember Love? during Anime Expo 2026. Join the premier presentation of the legendary masterpiece that has come to define the MACROSS franchise.

title: Aimai Mirai
description: Dance, jump and rock out wtih Aimai Mirai as they perform fresh and classic Anisong for an unstoppable anime song concert! Hailing from San Francisco Bay Area, Aimai Mirai is a high energy anime cover band composed of five passionate cosplayers, musicians, and more!

title: GKIDS Industry Panel
description: From the team that brings you films from celebrated filmmakers like Mamoru Hosoda, Masaaki Yuasa, and Studio Ghibli, comes the GKIDS Industry Panel! Join us for an inside scoop on what it takes to release the best films and series from around the world, and a sneak peek at what's to come!

title: Turning Fandom into a Career: Getting Started in Manga Publishing
description: Are you dreaming of a career in the manga/manhwa/comics industry? This panel of editors, marketers, and other industry professionals will talk about how they got their start working in the field and share insight on how you can reach your own career goals!

title: Your Guide to Living in Japan in 2026
description: You're thinking of living in Japan? Whether you want to study, find work or just stay temporarily, understanding your visa options is crucial. This panel will cover the different visa types, their requirements and benefits, so you can make your transition to life in Japan as smooth as possible.

title: Nikkei Choral Ensemble
description: The Nikkei Choral Ensemble (also known as NiCE) is the University of California, Berkeley's premiere Japanese and English acapella group. This Bay Area-based ensemble has been singing songs from anime, games, and pop culture for over 15 years, and will be making their Anime Expo debut this year! All of the music that NiCE performs is chosen and arranged by members of the group. They hope that you enjoy their favorite songs as much as they do!

title: Design Your Own Stoneware Piece
description: Join us at the 2026 Anime Expo for a paint-your-own pottery workshop. This workshop is a great way to get creative, create a one-of-a-kind keepsake from the Expo, and, as a bonus, you get time to rest your feet after a long day of exploring. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel. This room will NOT be cleared after this panel.***

title: K-Pop RPD
description: Time to put your K-POP dance knowledge to the test! Join other K-POP Fans and Dancers and come together on the dance floor as you all dance together to different songs from different K-POP generations, artists, and styles!

title: Charity Auction at Anime Expo 2026
description: Anime Expo works with our special guests from the industry to provide one-of-a-kind items for the annual Charity Auction. By participating in the Charity Auction you can do your part to support this years charitable cause: Los Angeles and Nagoya Sister City Affiliation (LANSCA).

title: Anime Expo 2026 Feedback Panel
description: Anime Expo has come and gone once again. Let us know what you loved, what you want to see more of, and what we can improve on for next year. A team of SPJA staff who worked tirelessly behind the scenes to bring you this year's event will be there to listen. Thank you for your continued support!

title: Faith in The Glitch
description: Faith in the Glitch has been a resident DJ for the nationally touring Future Funk party Yoi Toki, sharing stages with artists like Yung Bae, Saint Pepsi, and Macross 82-99. A lifelong anime nerd with a deep love for the culture, FitG blends anime edits, nostalgic mashups, fresh scratching, and high-energy party vibes into unforgettable sets. With decades behind the decks, Faith in the Glitch has rocked crowds at Otakon, Katsucon, Sakura-Con, and more—bringing convention energy and dance floor chaos wherever they go. Now, FitG is ready to bring that same energy west to Anime Expo in Los Angeles.

title: Make Your Debut as an Author in Japan!
description: Ever dreamed of publishing your story as a light novel —manga or even an anime— in Japan? Join KADOKAWA editor Satoshi Arima (The Rising of the Shield Hero, Full Metal Panic!) and authors Frettiko & Kazesenken, to learn how English writers can break into the Japanese market via our upcoming contest.

title: Atara Ara
description: Atara Ara is a four-piece rock band from Orange County mixing Japanese rock and American alt. Energetic, melodic, and shaped by a love for both scenes.

title: Maid Cafe
description:
Escape from reality and step into a world full of moe!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: S4X
description: Los Angeles based saxophone quartet who specializes in performing covers of popular anime and video game music. S4X has played numerous Anime Expo and AX Chibi events and even participated in the closing ceremony of Anime Expo 2019.

title: Debates and Hot Takes - Apothecary Diaries Edition
description: Are Maomao and Jinshi endgame? Who would be the best emperor? Is cat Maomao the best animal sidekick? Let's find out! Come to this Apothecary Diaries fan panel to discuss, debate and determine whose actions were justified and if we would have done the same.

title: Make your first helmet wig (they're not as daunting as you might think)
description:
Intimidated by helmet wigs? Join Wei's beginner-friendly ponytail wig panel to learn how to build a structured base, budget-friendly ponytail attachment/core, and select the right glue for each step. This class is ideal for cosplayers who've been eyeing a character but need a detailed walkthrough.
*Presented by AX26 Cosplay Senpai Weichiadi

title: Grand Summoners Developer Panel
description: Join in on this panel by game developer NextNinja to learn about the latest and upcoming news for the hit Anime RPG Grand Summoners! All participants will receive a free original gift as well as have a chance to receive exclusive merch!

title: A Psychiatrist on Anime Culture: How Your Favorite Anime Could Save Your Life
description: How do anime, manga, and music heal us? Psychiatrist Dr. Francesco Pantò — Anime Therapy originator at Yokohama City University — shares clinical findings on stories, characters, and sound as medicine. Featuring an exclusive video interview with FINAL FANTASY composer Nobuo Uematsu, plus Q&A.

title: Early Idols & City Pop: Music of the Showa Era
description: A timeline of Japanese Pop music from the 60s-80s. Learn about the origins of Japanese Idols, the rise and fall of City Pop, hear 80s anime themes, and answer trivia questions for media prizes!

title: OVER ALLs
description: OVER ALLs is a mural artist collective specializing in large-scale public murals. We create works for buildings and urban spaces worldwide. This April, we painted murals in Los Angeles for OC Japan Fair, Tenkaippin Little Tokyo, and Fame Yard. Enjoy our live drawing on the NOVO stage!

Inspired by the maid cafes of Akihabara, Anime Expo's Maid Café has been one of our most popular events. Our cute and courteous maids are ready to entertain you, whether they break out in song and dance or facilitate an activity. Enjoy a drink and an interactive show, and don't forget to thank the maids on your way out!

title: Closing Ceremony
description:
As Anime Expo 2026 concludes, the Closing Ceremony will 
give AX attendees the chance to reflect and wrap up their 
experiences with various performances and closing traditions. ***This room WILL be cleared prior to this panel.***

title: Shihori Performance @ Closing Ceremony (In Memoriam Performance)
description: SHIHORI is an LA-based J-pop singer-songwriter known for the viral fan-made JoJo's Bizarre Adventure theme, ”Holy Steel." A Billboard-charting artist with multiple Gold works in Japan, she has written 150+ songs for major acts and contributed to League of Legends, Fairy Tail, and Macross Frontier.
